Name: Mills
Description:
A leader in aerial platform rentals and engineering solutions for infrastructure, Mills invests to be the best partner in equipment rental and sales. Now, we also offer comprehensive intralogistics solutions with forklifts, pallet trucks, and tow tractors.
 
We are present throughout all national territory with 59 branches, serving 26 states and the Federal District in over 1,400 cities.
 
Count on us to provide the ideal equipment for your demand!

Name: Armac
Description:
Fundada há 30 anos, a Armac é referência na prestação de serviços especializados e complexos, na locação de equipamentos e na venda de seminovos. Com mais de 11,5 mil ativos de Linha Amarela, caminhões e empilhadeiras, apoia setores estratégicos da economia brasileira, em operações de mineração, siderurgia, portos e terminais ferroviários, fertilizantes, florestais, agroindústria, indústria, infraestrutura e construção.

A empresa se destaca pela excelência operacional, eficiência em produtividade e compromisso com a segurança. Conta com uma equipe de mais de 4 mil colaboradores, entre eles mais de mil mecânicos e 2,4 mil operadores e motoristas. Com cerca de 200 operações de longo prazo em todo o Brasil, movimenta anualmente mais de 140 milhões de toneladas de materiais, entre minérios, fertilizantes, biomassa, açúcar, sal, grãos, enxofre, metais, madeira, produtos industrializados, alimentos, bebidas, peças automotivas, entre outros.

Com um complexo de manutenção de 300 mil m², o maior da América Latina, e um estoque de R$ 65 milhões em peças e componentes, é referência em serviços de manutenção, com 30 estruturas próprias em todo País, entre oficinas, filiais e apoio logístico. Além disso, a companhia possui lojas de seminovos em Cotia e Americana (SP), Betim (MG), Rondonópolis (MT), Feira de Santana (BA) e São José dos Pinhais (PR).
Listada no Novo Mercado da B3, a companhia adota as melhores práticas de governança corporativa e continua expandindo suas operações para apoiar as pessoas que constroem o Brasil.

Nosso site para locação: https://rental.armac.com.br/
Nosso site para seminovos: https://seminovos.armac.com.br/
Canal de Ética: https://canaletico.missaocompliance.com.br/canal-etico/armac

Name: Tecnogera
Description:
A Tecnogera é uma empresa de infraestrutura e prestação de serviços em energia temporária e atua com locação de Grupos Geradores de energia, Bancos de Cargas, Torres de Iluminação, Cabos Elétricos e Transformadores. Possui ampla expertise no atendimento das necessidades dos segmentos da construção civil, indústrias, usinas, instituições financeiras, mineradoras e eventos, com geradores de 20 a 1.500 kVA, podendo atender soluções para plantas multi-megawatts. 

Acomoda uma frota de equipamentos renovada continuamente e garante disponibilidade em todas as potências, possibilitando um serviço da mais alta confiabilidade, com responsabilidade ambiental. Um diferencial no atendimento da Tecnogera está na agilidade: leva energia em qualquer parte do Brasil em tempo recorde, 24 horas por dia, 7 dias por semana.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Byrne Equipment Rental LLC
Description:
For over 30 years, Byrne Group has led the Middle East’s equipment rental industry — proudly ranked in the Top 100 Global Equipment Rental Companies (IRN100) and one of only two firms from the region on the list.

Headquartered in Dubai, Byrne delivers turnkey rental and infrastructure solutions across the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman, and Bahrain, supported by a fleet of 14,000+ assets spanning modular buildings, power, climate control, hoist & access, sanitation, mobile lighting, and hybrid solar systems.

Beyond equipment, we’re a solutions partner committed to reliability, innovation, and sustainability — investing in digital transformation, and green power alongside our regional expansion.

Name: TNT Crane & Rigging, Inc.
Description:
TNT Crane & Rigging is one of the largest maintained and operated crane service providers in North America. TNT’s lifting solutions are a synergy of experience, training, and specialized equipment, producing a safe and invaluable service to our customers 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

TNT Crane & Rigging serves multiple markets including oil & gas, refining, petrochemical, industrial, power generation, wind energy, infrastructure, construction, and commercial end markets.

TNT Crane & Rigging operates with a modern fleet of more than 700 cranes: Mobile Truck-Mount Cranes, Hydraulic All-Terrain Cranes, Hydraulic Rough-Terrain Cranes, Crawler Cranes, and Tower Cranes. The company’s crane fleet ranges in lifting capacity from 1 ton to 900 tons. TNT Crane & Rigging has an extended fleet of specialized equipment: Hydraulic Gantry Lift Systems, Jack & Slide Systems, Specialized Forklifts, Cantilever Bars, Self-Propelled Modular Transporters, Dual-Lane Heavy Haul Tractor/Trailer Combinations, and Specialized Rigging Equipment.

With headquarters in Houston, TX, TNT Crane & Rigging primarily serves customers in the Southern region of the United States with branches strategically positioned throughout Texas, Oklahoma, and Louisiana. The TNT Family of Companies is comprised of six regional brands which all operate within the TNT company structure. Southway Crane & Rigging services the Southeastern region of the United States while RMS Cranes & JMS Crane & Rigging serve customers throughout the Rocky Mountain and Midwest regions. TNT Crane & Rigging also has full-service branches within Western Canada along with Eagle West Cranes and Stampede Crane & Rigging.

Name: Grupo Cordeiro BR
Description:
In the market since 1979, Grupo Cordeiro operates with excellence in practical solutions in the transportation, movement and storage of heavy loads, using state-of-the-art equipment and tools, developing and implementing safe and quality solutions, and contributing to the growth of the country.

We work with a focus on the customer focus, a practical methodology implemented to guarantee the best and most appropriate solution for each client, with technology and excellence projects according to their needs.

Name: Dayim Equipment Rental
Description:
Established in 2010, Dayim Equipment Rental Corporation is a premier equipment rental company covering the GCC with operations in Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and Kuwait. 

Dayim Equipment Rental is committed to providing high quality and international standards of service and maintenance of its equipment. Our strategic vendor partnerships ensure all our equipment are in top shape and well maintained, to meet the varied requirement of our vast customer profile. 

Be it an Event-based requirement or multiple year long-term project, Dayim Equipment Rental comes with solutions that are tailor-made to every Customer.  

We are committed to providing quality equipment and service to customers across the region. Safety as our mantra, we ensure complete compliance with the requirement of the project site/process application where the equipment will be utilized. 

Our fleet, being one of the youngest in the region, comprises of the following:
-	Generators
-	Air Compressors
-	Welding Machines
-	Lighting Towers
-	Manlifts 
-	Forklifts
-	Telehandlers
-	Skid Steer Loaders
-	Backhoes

All our equipment comes with supplier fitted telematics – should there be a malfunction or machine stoppage or even a false alarm, we will be by your side, addressing and fixing, almost immediately.  Our team of highly skilled, experienced service engineers are available 24/7 to assist you.

Name: NORTHGATE ESPAÑA
Description:
El auténtico renting flexible para empresas, autónomos y particulares. 
Por meses, sin permanencia y con todo incluido. 

Te ayudamos a escoger la mejor opción de movilidad para ti, sin ataduras y con la calidad Northgate. 

Y con Northgate Talleres, repara y mantén tu vehículo en nuestra red de talleres propios.

Northgate es una compañía totalmente orientada al cliente, y su actividad está centrada en dar soluciones de movilidad a las empresas adaptadas a sus necesidades. Por eso, ofrecemos la auténtica flexibilidad en cuanto a duración o tipología de contratación, así como una amplia gama de vehículos que son concebidos por las empresas como herramientas de trabajo para el desarrollo de su actividad, siendo el referente de este segmento en el mercado español.

Name: Trimak Engenharia
Description:
Há quatro décadas no mercado a TRIMAK Engenharia e Comércio LTDA vem aprimorando elementos indispensáveis para melhor servir a seus clientes: qualidade, confiabilidade, segurança e versatilidade. 
A TRIMAK tem acompanhado as ultimas tendências e tecnologias do mercado para levar até a sua empresa as mais modernas e eficientes soluções.

Na TRIMAK você pode comprar ou alugar as melhores linhas de equipamentos para construção civil e rodoviária, movimentação de cargas, trabalho em altura, iluminação em obras, limpeza industrial, geração de energia, entre outros. 

Oferecemos soluções de engenharia com  tubos de PVC estruturados fabricados in loco. Tais soluções incluem o suporte de nossa equipe técnica, instalada em qualquer região do Brasil, desde o projeto até a execução da obra.

Com uma linha bastante diversificada de equipamentos, a TRIMAK executa serviços de engenharia como: pavimentação, terraplanagem, demolições e britagem de materiais.

Name: FRAIKIN France
Description:
Spécialiste des solutions de mobilité, et numéro 1 en Europe de la location de véhicules industriels et commerciaux, FRAIKIN propose l’offre de produits et services la plus large du marché. Notre mission est d’apporter des solutions clé en main aux professionnels qui veulent pouvoir se concentrer sur leur cœur de métier, tout en améliorant la productivité de leur flotte. 

Notre expertise s’appuie sur 80 ans d’accompagnement de tous types de clients, au sein de multiples secteurs d’activité, à travers des offres de location (longue / moyenne / courte durée, avec ou sans conducteur), de gestion de flotte, mais aussi de nombreux services, notamment digitaux. 

Avec aujourd’hui plus de 60 000 véhicules en circulation dans 10 pays, ce sont plus de 11 200 clients qui nous font confiance! Notre engagement? Les aider à réduire leurs coûts d’exploitation, leur assurer une continuité dans leurs activités, et surtout les accompagner dans la transition énergétique de leurs parcs. 

Notre force? Nos 3 000 collaborateurs, et notre réseau de plus de 110  agences en France avec chacune un véritable atelier intégré. Avec des équipes formées en continu et des collaborateurs qui évoluent dans le groupe tout au long de leur carrière, FRAIKIN est une entreprise unique mettant le service, le relationnel et la proximité au cœur de ses préoccupations.

Name: Dawsongroup
Description:
Dawsongroup is a business-to-business asset hire and funding group of companies supported by KKR, a leading global investment firm. Our assets represent over thirty thousand supply chain links used across every industry.

Our service solutions are represented across our group businesses with different specialisms, including wheeled assets, automation and the global supply of modular temperature control solutions.

Name: Alayan
Description:
Alayan is a multi-specialist supplier of rental solutions and services for machinery and equipment, designed to meet the needs of different sectors.

Present in Italy, Spain and Portugal, it offers a fleet of over 25,000 units, supported by a team of highly qualified professionals, to offer integrated and cutting-edge solutions.

Born from the union of CGTE, Emerent and Finanzauto Rental, Alayan combines experience and skills to guarantee an efficient, technologically advanced and tailor-made service for every need.

Thanks to a diversified offer and a strong focus on quality and innovation, Alayan is the strategic partner for companies that need flexible and reliable rental solutions, with specialized services in the Power, Temperature Control, Events and Modules & Container sectors.

Name: Dawsongroup
Description:
Dawsongroup is a leading specialist asset rental business operating in several related markets within the European logistics sector.

Our rental product portfolio is focused on high quality premium products typically with high unit values.

Dawsongroup has a consistent track record spanning over 35 years. It operates in several related markets principally within the UK but with a growing European presence and its rental portfolio amounting to over 22,500 assets, is focused on high quality premium products typically with high unit values including commercial vehicles, trailers, buses, coaches, sweepers, materials handling equipment, an extensive range of temperature-controlled products and kitchen units. It also provides finance broker services. The Group's broad customer base is represented mainly by large reputable companies.

Name: Johnson Crane Hire
Description:
Johnson Crane Hire (JCH) is the largest crane hire company in Africa with a track record of over 40 years, operating since 1976. Whether you need 1 crane or 100 cranes; Johnson Crane Hire can provide the right lifting solution, regardless of the complexity of the lift. 

Our crane and lifting fleet consists of various crane and platforms ranging from 8 ton to 750 ton lifting capacity and is the largest, most modern mobile crane fleet in Africa. 

We operate throughout South Africa with a network of 13 branches locally and regularly work in neighbouring and SADC countries.

We are committed to deliver SMART;
safety, maintenance, availability, reliability and total cost effectiveness.

Name: Petit Forestier España
Description:
Porque los profesionales necesitan desarrollar su actividad con total tranquilidad, en Petit Forestier nuestra misión es garantizar la continuidad operativa y simplificar la gestión de la cadena de frío de nuestros clientes.

Somos líderes en el alquiler de soluciones frigoríficas y ofrecemos una amplia gama de vehículos, contenedores y equipos refrigerados. Nuestro compromiso es brindar un servicio completo, personalizado y de alta calidad, además de facilitar a nuestros clientes el acceso a las últimas innovaciones y normativas. Esto permite a todos aquellos que confían en nosotros garantizar el funcionamiento ininterrumpido de su cadena de frío las 24 horas del día, los 7 días de la semana.

Con nuestros socios carroceros industriales integrados, diseñamos soluciones de temperatura controlada comprobadas para transportar y almacenar el frío de manera más sostenible. Presentes en 21 países de Europa, África, Oriente Medio y Estados Unidos, contamos con una red de 300 agencias locales.

Como marca emblemática del Grupo Petit Forestier, una empresa familiar fundada en 1907, nos beneficiamos de la experiencia y la innovación de un Grupo dedicado al dominio sostenible de la cadena de frío en todas sus etapas, desde la fabricación industrial hasta la reacondicionamiento de equipos frigoríficos para una economía más circular.
Location: Daganzo de Arriba, Community of Madrid

Name: CKC Surmac NV
Description:
Business Profile

Since 1941 we have been the only authorized Caterpillar representative in Suriname but we also represent other renowned brands.

Name: Vulp Air
Description:
Climatização inteligente por assinatura.

A climatização evoluiu. A gente também.
Nascemos de uma visão inovadora há mais de 50 anos e, hoje, nos transformamos e somos a Vulp Air, a única empresa de climatização inteligente por assinatura no Brasil.

Mais do que ar-condicionado, entregamos conforto térmico. Sem compra, sem preocupação e sem sufoco.

Oferecemos soluções sob medida para cada negócio, no ritmo de cada cliente, com equipamentos sempre atualizados e a melhor tecnologia, suporte proativo, previsibilidade e eficiência garantida.

Presentes em todo o Brasil, atendemos diversos setores, com grandes clientes em segmentos como: hotelaria, saúde e bem-estar, educação, varejo, entre outros.

VULP air: a evolução em conforto térmico.

Name: CGTE
Description:
CGT Edilizia è specializzata nell'offrire soluzioni integrate nel settore delle costruzioni e dell’edilizia. 

Vendita e noleggio di macchine compatte CAT unite a un parco macchine di gruppi elettrogeni, piattaforme di sollevamento e torri faro. Dal 2016 è inoltre attiva la divisione EIS – Eventi, Industria e Servizi – il primo general contractor italiano dedicato a questi settori. 

CGT Edilizia è parte del Gruppo Tesa comprendente CGT, che dal 1934 è il punto di riferimento italiano per i prodotti a marchio CAT, CLS, CGT Trucks e Tecknoxgroup.

Renterra is a venture-backed software company, building the next generation of software for equipment rental companies.

Renterra is a fully remote company.

Name: Holland Pump
Description: Holland Pump was formed in 1978 in West Palm Beach, FL. For over 40 years, Holland Pump has been a leader in the manufacture, sale, distribution, rental, and service of specialty pumps and dewatering solutions. With a relentless focus on customer service and enabling its customers to complete their projects faster and with less hassle, Holland Pump has gained a reputation for its expertise in the United States. From its headquarters in West Palm Beach, Holland Pump has grown to 16 branch operations across Texas, Florida, Louisiana, New York, Pennsylvania, Maryland, and South Carolina.

Name: Madhu Infotech
Description:
We take Privilege in introducing ourselves as a team of computer service professionals & prominent computer hardware suppliers. Technocrats, who have served the IT industry for several years, founded Madhu Infotech in the year 1999. Today we have the honors of serving several Clients who envy our services. Over a period of time we have structured the way the service industry needs to work with a work force that are available to our clients just a call away.We have designed and implemented effective systems that are in place to track each and every detail to the micro level. From Call Logging to Call tracking to inventory management we have systems in place that are on par with the industry standards. Prompt response, through subject knowledge, ample spare support & providing cost-effective solutions have made us to enjoy the benefits of existing clientele and earned a good name for our services. Processes and systems have driven our business. Generic processes have been worked out for each service and they are customized for every customer. 

We have endeavored to achieve our Corporate Mission of 'Helping our customers to help their customers better'. We believe in Phillip Crosby's quality principal of 'Doing everything right the first time and every time'. Madhu Infotech has always endeavored to achieve excellence in Quality and Customer Satisfaction. Enviable service being our motto, we take utmost care to ensure that our customers have the highest degree of satisfaction.

Name: Biosteam Energia Renovável
Description:
Com mais de 30 anos de experiência, a Biosteam, resultado da fusão das tradicionais empresas Incal e Conterma, é especialista na geração de energia térmica (vapor) para clientes industriais. 

Utilizando combustíveis de fontes renováveis, como cavaco de eucalipto, cavaco reciclado e biomassa de resíduos agrícolas e florestais, a Biosteam gera vapor para grandes indústrias nacionais e multinacionais de diversos segmentos, como têxtil, alimentos, ração animal, embalagens e autopeças.

Acesse nosso site e conheça mais sobre nós

https://biosteam.com.br/

Name: Eazi Access
Description:
Founded in 2003, Eazi Access is Africa’s market leader in work-at-height and material-handling solutions. Our comprehensive offering includes rental, sales, servicing and training across a range of industries and applications. 

As an established market leader, we have worked on some of the most exciting projects in our regions. We are consistently recognised by our customers for delivering an incredible service. We are also able to quantify the cost and time-saving potential of our solutions, something that has proven to be invaluable to our customers. 

We manage every customer interaction and solution with the same approach: to add value to the business of our customers in the areas of cost savings, productivity gains, risk management and safety improvements.

We partner with the world’s leading equipment manufacturers and have the largest, most diverse fleet of Scissor Lifts, Boom Lifts, Mini Cranes, Personnel Lifts, High Capacity Telehandlers, Rotational Telehandlers and Telehandlers on the continent. Our fleet is maintained in line with manufacturers’ specifications, and relevant legislation and regulations. It’s supported by our network of technical experts and an extensive supply of parts, ensuring our customers gain the maximum benefit from the equipment they use.

We continually review global best practices to ensure our equipment, support and training are of the highest standard and in line with international safety and regulatory requirements.

We are building on our legacy of entrepreneurship and determination as we pursue our strategy for growth and expansion. We aim to produce long-term, sustainable results and make a difference in the lives of our customers, employees and communities.

Name: Nexrise India Infra Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Nexrise India Infra Pvt Ltd, rooted in Mumbai, Maharashtra, provides the finest quality sourcing for height safety equipment across India. You will get a one-stop solution for making your project site safer than ever before.

Nexrise India was founded in 2012 by J.P. Suthar and his dedicated team with the goal of making working at heights safer and more accessible. Since then, our company has grown to become a leading supplier in the construction equipment industry through its parent company, Jagdish Enterprise, which was followed by Cloudnine, Nexrise India, and Atreya Essentials.

We believe in staying committed to making a difference, and we are actively trying to raise awareness and keep people safe when working at heights.

Products range:- (Available as per your requirement)

Aluminium Scaffold towers
FRP Scaffolds
Aluminium Ladders (All types)
FRP Ladders
Industrial Ladders
Hydraulic scissor lift
Aerial work Platforms
Suspended Platforms

Key product quality highlights:

Raw material - 100% procured from HINDALCO 
TIG welding process is done by certified welders in accordance with EN & AWI 
In-house anodizing and powder coating facility with a capacity of 8000 tons. 
All safety certifications: OSHA, ANSI, TUV NORD, DNV, DIN, 
Availability PAN INDIA and across UAE and GCC.
Overseas technology and marketing offices: USA and Germany and UAE.
Clients across all the major sectors like Aviation, Wind and energy, Rail, Infrastructure, Petroleum etc.

Scaffolding solutions are brought to you by a team with immense experience and also provide customized height access equipment as needed. 

We are keen to assist you with your queries.

Let's make working on heights safer than ever!

Name: TIBBLOC
Description: Tibbloc, French leading specialist in the rental of turnkey equipment for heating, cooling, air conditioning, air treatment, steam and compressed air solutions. Tibbloc operates with its modular energies 24/7. In France and in Europe, reactive experts are mobilised to study, deliver, install and supervise your temporary energy solution.

Name: MECORP MAQUINARIAS
Description:
Somos una empresa proveedora de equipos y maquinaria, especializados en alquiler y venta para construcción, minería e industria en general, así como también servicios integrales de reparación, mantenimiento de equipos y maquinarias en general. 

Con profesionales que cuentan con más de 10 años de experiencia en el rubro, por lo cual tenemos la capacidad de brindar soluciones a las necesidades que el mercado exige y brindar el mejor servicio.

Estamos presentes en todo el territorio nacional, lo cual nos caracteriza por brindar un servicio rápido y de calidad que el rubro lo requiere.

Name: KILOUTOU Italia
Description:
Cofiloc è il primo gruppo italiano indipendente che noleggia macchine professionali per l’edilizia e il sollevamento ed è presente con nove filiali nelle regioni Veneto, Friuli Venezia Giulia ed Emilia Romagna. 

I professionisti Cofiloc sono vicini ai clienti in tutte le fasi del noleggio: dall’analisi delle specifiche esigenze all’individuazione del macchinario più adatto, al fine di offrire sempre un servizio affidabile e su misura.

Description:

Standorte: AT-Thiersee (Zentrale), DE-Kiefersfelden (Vertriebszentrale Deutschland), DE-Diedorf (Vertriebsstandort), DE-Heilbronn (Technik-Standort), AT-Weiz (Technik-Standort)

Dabei sind die Einsatzbereiche unserer leistungsfähigen Anlagen so unterschiedlich wie umfangreich:
-	Von der Beheizung von Winterbaustellen bis zur Gebäudekühlung bei Klimaanlagen-Ausfall.
-	Von der Trocknung nach Wasserschäden bis zur Heizungsüberbrückung im Schadensfall.
-	Von der Klimatisierung temporärer Infrastruktur (z.B. Impfzentren, Notunterkünfte, Container-Dörfer, Zelte) bis zu Überbrückungs-Energie bei geplanten Wartungen.
-	Von der Warmwasseraufbereitung für Event-Duschen bis zu Blackout-Szenarien bei der Anbindung als Redundanz-Anlagen bei Fernwärmeheizwerken, u.v.m.
Unsere Miet-Lösungen haben dabei entscheidende Vorteile:
-	Geringere Kosten im Gegensatz zu langfristig gebundenem Investitionskapital
-	Flexible Miet-Dauer – auch kurzfristig veränderbar
-	Umfangreiches Angebot an verschiedenen Anlagen namhafter Hersteller in allen Leistungsbereichen – stets auf Stand der Technik
-	Alle Komponenten sind entweder im Gesamt-Paket oder als einzelne Bestandteile mietbar
-	Rundum-Service von Abbau bis Abholung durch unsere geschulten Mitarbeiter – auch per Fernwartung und modernster IoT-Technologie
-	24/7-Service-Hotline

Alles unsere Anlagen können entweder als autarke Einzel-Lösungen eingesetzt oder an bestehende Systeme angedockt werden.
Mehr über Produkte, Einsatzbereiche und über uns erfahren Sie auf unserer Website unter:

We partner with businesses in industries, including warehousing, manufacturing, rigging, railroad, building and construction, breweries, agriculture, government and local municipalities, and more, to deliver customized solutions for their industrial lift equipment needs.

National Lift Arkansas is family-owned and operated and part of a family of companies with locations throughout the US, including Illinois, Tennessee, Arkansas, and New York.

Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec nos clients pour comprendre leurs besoins et leur offrir des solutions sur mesure qui répondent à leurs exigences.

Notre présence nationale nous permet d'être un partenaire de choix pour les entreprises soucieuses de leur impact environnemental et de leur efficacité logistique. Nous sommes fiers d'aider nos clients à réduire leur empreinte carbone tout en améliorant leur efficacité opérationnelle.

Contactez-nous dès maintenant pour en savoir plus sur nos services de location d'emballages réutilisables et pour discuter de la manière dont nous pouvons vous aider à réduire votre impact environnemental tout en optimisant vos coûts logistiques.

Name: GFE Group srl
Description:
Nel vasto universo della logistica e della movimentazione industriale, noi di GFE Group ci affermiamo come un'autorità indiscussa. La nostra competenza si estende dalla commercializzazione di macchine per il sollevamento e la movimentazione delle merci, alla progettazione di soluzioni logistiche per magazzini e scaffalature industriali, fino alla vendita di macchine per la pulizia e veicoli elettrici.

Ci distinguiamo per la nostra capacità di fornire un servizio tempestivo e altamente professionale, sempre all'avanguardia grazie a prodotti di ultima generazione.

In dettaglio, noi di GFE Group offriamo:

Logistica: Non ci limitiamo a identificare le aree di miglioramento nella gestione dei magazzini. Andiamo oltre, fornendo consulenza e soluzioni concrete derivanti da un'analisi accurata della gestione ottimizzata dei magazzini. Questo include la progettazione di layout di impianto su misura per le esigenze industriali e logistiche, l'installazione e il collaudo di tutte le infrastrutture necessarie.

Carrelli elevatori: Non ci limitiamo alla vendita, noleggio e assistenza multimarca di carrelli elevatori. Il nostro obiettivo è creare il massimo valore per il cliente, trasformando le esigenze in soluzioni concrete.

Cleaning industriale: Offriamo un servizio completo che include un magazzino di prodotti e materiali di consumo, un servizio completo di ricambi e un'officina di assistenza attrezzata.

Soluzioni finanziarie: Andiamo oltre il concetto tradizionale di leasing e noleggio operativo. Le nostre soluzioni finanziarie sono progettate per creare valore e sostenere la crescita e le ambizioni dei nostri clienti.

Inoltre, offriamo un servizio completo che spazia dalla fornitura di prodotti e macchinari multimarca nuovi ed usati, alla locazione operativa e finanziaria a medio e lungo termine, fino all'assistenza tecnica e alla formazione del personale. Questo approccio olistico è guidato da un team manageriale con oltre vent'anni di esperienza nel settore.

Name: Complete Specialty Services, LLC
Description:
Our Mission at Complete Specialty Services is to qualify, authorize, and certify our customers as safe operators of construction equipment.

We achieve our Mission by providing complete training in the knowledge, comprehension, and hands-on application of the construction equipment to those who must safely and professionally operate aerial work platforms (MEWPs), industrial trucks (telehandlers & forklifts), earthmoving equipment (skid steer & mini excavators), and material handling equipment (glass manipulators) in accordance with OSHA regulations and ANSI standard requirements.
An integral part of our Mission is to ensure all construction site personnel, authorized to operate complete equipment, are able to do so with the utmost safety so they can return home at the end of the day.

Our Vision is to be the construction industry’s first choice for their complete equipment rental needs as well as the premier choice to provide safety and familiarization training because of the quality and uniqueness of the equipment we maintain and the thoroughness of the training we offer. Our actions will show people that we are committed to customer safety and satisfaction. Our attitudes will be recognized as being members of a team that works together to be the leaders of the equipment rental and safety training industry.

Name: Bera Stillads- og Liftudlejning A/S
Description:
Bera Stillads – 58 års erfaring i højden 

Siden 1966 har vi hos Bera Stillads hjulpet byggebranchen med sikre, fleksible og professionelle stilladsløsninger – leveret til tiden og i topkvalitet.

Vi stræber ikke efter at være de største.
Vores mål er at være de bedste – for vores kunder, samarbejdspartnere og medarbejdere.

 Vi løser alle typer stilladsopgaver – store som små, enkle som komplekse.
 Med over et halvt århundredes erfaring sikrer vi, at dit projekt står stærkt – og sikkert.
 Vi ved, at tid er penge – derfor leverer vi altid til tiden og med respekt for din planlægning.

Hos os er du ikke bare endnu en opgave. Du er en samarbejdspartner.
Derfor prioriterer vi dialog, fleksibilitet og et højt serviceniveau – hver gang.

 Leder du efter et stilladsfirma, du kan stole på?
Så er vi klar til at løfte opgaven – bogstaveligt talt.

 Kontakt os i dag, og lad os finde den løsning, der passer til netop dit projekt.

Name: PROVIDERS A/S
Description:
PROVIDERS er en professionel landsdækkende materiel- og liftudlejningsvirksomhed med base i den gamle maskinforretning i Hjallerup i Nordjylland. Vi beskæftiger os med udlejning af maskinmateriel til flere forskellige forretningsområder inden for entreprenørbranchen, bygge- og anlægsindustrien, det offentlige, store detailkunder, samt eventselskaber og festivaler.

Vores kunder tilbydes adgang til et stort udvalg af maskinmateriel og serviceydelser. Vores sortiment består af små og store gravemaskiner, mini- og gummihjulslæsser, dumpere og traktor-vognsæt, teleskoplæssere, lifte, gaffeltrucks, gatorer og UTV’ere og meget mere.
Ud af vores sortiment tilbydes flere af vores maskiner desuden på el.

Vi servicerer og reparerer maskiner på vores værksted og ude hos kunderne, eftersom vi også råder over en flåde af topmoderne servicebiler. Derudover har vi et stærkt samarbejde med vores maskinleverandører om altid også at kunne trække på deres respektive serviceorganisationer døgnet rundt.

Vi ser os selv som en ansvarlig og innovativ samarbejdspartner, og hos os er en aftale en aftale. Pålidelighed og ordentlighed er nogle af nøgleingredienserne i vores forretningsstrategi, som har gjort os til det, vi er i dag.

Vores erfarne kollegaer er dedikerede og engagerede og sætter en ære i altid at levere det rette materiel til den rette opgave og til den aftalte tid og pris. Derudover hjælper vi selvfølgelig også altid gerne med at rådgive om materialevalg og besvare spørgsmål før, under og efter lejemålet.

Samarbejde bygger på tillid og loyalitet. Selvom vi måske ikke er den største aktør på materieludlejningsmarkedet, så sætter vi en ære i at levere høj kundetilfredshed og det rette materiel af høj kvalitet.

Name: PT. MAX RENT INDONESIA
Description:
PT. Max Rent Indonesia is a rental company specialized in renting heavy equipment for commercial and construction. 

Marubeni Corporation (hereinafter, “Marubeni”) and Rent Corporation (hereinafter,  “Rent”) have established a joint venture company named PT. Max Rent Indonesia in partnership with local entity PT. EXXA Capital (hereinafter, “EXXA”), which operates and develops businesses involving used construction machinery sales, construction machinery rentals, logistics, and automobile auctions, to provide construction and industrial machinery rental services in the Republic of Indonesia (hereinafter, “Indonesia”) set to be launched in December 2023.

In recent years, Indonesia has continued to actively invest in infrastructure development and expand its construction market. Major industrial parks have also seen expansive growth, mainly in the Jakarta metropolitan area (Indonesia’s most populous metropolitan area and home to its national capital), and investment in the manufacturing industry has been booming. However, the availability of safe, high-quality equipment  is limited, resulting in unmet needs and inefficiencies at construction and industrial sites. PT Max Rent Indonesia therefore aims to address the evolving needs of diverse job sites and contribute to improved work efficiency by leveraging the networks and capabilities of the participating three companies and offering a wide range of well-maintained equipment with excellent safety features. This collaborative effort will help bridge the gap in the availability of reliable machinery for construction and industrial use.

Both Marubeni and Rent bring respective expertise and extensive experience to PT. Max Rent Indonesia. Marubeni has long been involved in major infrastructure projects in Indonesia, contributing to the country’s economic development, while Rent has an excellent track record of providing construction and industrial equipment rental.

https://www.marubeni.com/en/news/2023/release/00108.html

Ofrecemos furgonetas desde 3-4 m³, ideales para pequeñas mudanzas y paquetería en la ciudad, hasta opciones más grandes de 14 m³ a 20 m³, perfectas para cargas voluminosas. También disponemos de furgonetas de hasta 9 plazas para viajes en grupo, vehículos 100% eléctricos y furgonetas extra largas de alta gama. Cada uno de nuestros vehículos te proporcionará comodidad, eficiencia y seguridad, asegurando que tu experiencia de alquiler sea inmejorable.

La mejora constante y el servicio al cliente son nuestro motor. En Telefurgo, entendemos que cada cliente es único y trabajamos incansablemente para ofrecer un servicio personalizado que supere tus expectativas. Nuestro equipo de expertos está siempre disponible para asesorarte y ayudarte a encontrar la solución de transporte que mejor se adapte a tus necesidades.

Descubre la calidad y versatilidad de nuestras furgonetas. En Telefurgo, estamos comprometidos a hacer que tu experiencia de alquiler sea fácil y satisfactoria.

Nuestro cualificado equipo humano permite el óptimo funcionamiento de la maquinaria mediante el adecuado control y mantenimiento de la misma, y a su vez le facilita su disponibilidad allá donde la necesite, cuando la necesite, asesorándole en cuantas cuestiones precise sobre el uso o conveniencia de la misma.

En definitiva, nuestro actual Servicio de Alquiler es fruto de la mejora continua conseguida mediante la experiencia, la adaptación y dedicación, necesaria para garantizar la satisfacción de los profesionales y particulares que confían en Potencia. Garantía avalada por nuestro Sistema de Calidad basado en la norma UNE-EN ISO 9001:2008 y certificado por BVQI.

En la actualidad trabajamos para minimizar el impacto medioambiental de nuestra actividad, mejorando la gestión de nuestros residuos, evitando la adquisición de maquinaria irrespetuosa con el medio ambiente, conscientes de la importancia de la implantación de políticas de desarrollo sostenibles.

Name: Ydroplastiki
Description:
Η ΥΔΡΟΠΛΑΣΤΙΚΗ δραστηριοποιείται στο χώρο της ύδρευσης, θέρμανσης & αποχέτευσης μέσω της εμπορίας υδραυλικών ειδών, που περιλαμβάνουν πλαστικούς σωλήνες και εξαρτήματα εγκαταστάσεων θέρμανσης, ύδρευσης, άρδευσης και αποχέτευσης, καθώς και είδη υγιεινής.

Με την ίδρυσή της, η εταιρεία εξασφάλισε την αποκλειστική αντιπροσωπεία της Δρίβα ΠΛΑΣΤ για την περιοχή της Μακεδονίας – Θράκης, μιας ηγετικής ελληνικής εταιρίας παραγωγής πλαστικών σωλήνων (U-PVC) και πολυαιθυλενίου (PE – PP), πιστοποιημένης από την ΤÜV AUSTRIA HELLAS.

Παράλληλα, συνεργάστηκε αποκλειστικά με μεγάλους οίκους της Ιταλίας, Σερβίας, Βουλγαρίας και Κίνας για την εισαγωγή υδραυλικών προϊόντων άριστης ποιότητας, στοχεύοντας στην παροχή ολοκληρωμένων λύσεων προς τους πελάτες της.

Το 2009 η ανοδική πορεία μας και τα σχέδια μας για περαιτέρω επέκταση, μας οδήγησαν στις καινούριες ιδιόκτητες εγκαταστάσεις μας στο 11ο χλμ. Π.Ε.Ο. Θεσσαλονίκης – Κιλκίς

Το 2017 η ΥΔΡΟΠΛΑΣΤΙΚΗ άνοιξε ένα νέο κεφάλαιο προς την ανάπτυξη της, καλωσορίζοντας τη δεύτερη γενιά του διοικητικού προσωπικού της, και προχωρώντας παράλληλα σε νέες συνεργασίες, αυξάνοντας συνεχώς την ανταγωνιστηκότητα της με μεγαλύτερη γκάμα προϊόντων και εξαιρετική ποιότητα.

Σήμερα, όλοι εμείς στην ΥΔΡΟΠΛΑΣΤΙΚΗ συνεχίζουμε να τηρούμε την υπόσχεσή μας, παρέχοντας συνεχή τεχνογνωσία, άριστα υδραυλικά είδη και ταχεία εξυπηρέτηση στους πελάτες μας. Ταυτόχρονα παραμένει πάντα πρώτο μέλημά μας να βρισκόμαστε ένα βήμα πριν από τις ανάγκες της αγοράς!

Med mange år i byggebranchen kan vi med sikkerhed sige, at langt de fleste vælger en lejeløsning, når det kommer til lifte, og med god grund! Lad os står for det praktiske. Det eneste du skal gøre er at række hånden ud, via kontaktformular eller direkte via telefon, så sørger vi for resten.
Står du og skal bruge en lift til et byggeprojekt over en længere periode, så sørger vi for at give dig et skarpt tilbud.

Vi sidder klar ved telefonen til at tage i mod dig!

Name: PT. Battery Power Solutions International (BPSI)
Description:
PT Battery Power Solution International (BPSI): Mitra Terpercaya Anda dalam Solusi Baterai Traction. 

PT Battery Power Solution International, dikenal luas sebagai BPSI, adalah perusahaan terkemuka yang mengkhususkan diri dalam perbaikan, pemeliharaan, dan penyewaan baterai traksi. Dengan pengalaman lebih dari 13 tahun di industri ini, BPSI telah memantapkan dirinya sebagai mitra terpercaya bagi perusahaan yang mencari solusi baterai yang andal dan hemat biaya. 

PT. Battery Power Solution International (BPSI) telah tumbuh dan berkembang sejak didirikan pada tahun 2012, secara konsisten memberikan inovasi dan keunggulan dalam industri baterai traksi. Di bawah ini adalah kronologi pencapaian penting kami:

2012
PT. BPSI didirikan dengan fokus pada penyediaan layanan penyewaan baterai traksi, yang menjadi landasan komitmen kami terhadap kualitas dan keandalan.

2013
Perusahaan mengalami transformasi signifikan dengan berganti nama menjadi PT. Battery Power Solutions International, mencerminkan visi dan dedikasi yang lebih luas untuk menjadi pemimpin dalam solusi baterai.

2018
Memperluas layanan kami hingga mencakup penjualan, penyewaan, perbaikan, perbaikan baterai dan pengisi daya, menawarkan solusi lengkap untuk memenuhi beragam kebutuhan pelanggan kami.

2021
Secara resmi memasuki pasar sebagai pedagang baterai dan pengisi daya baru, memperkuat posisi kami sebagai mitra terpercaya untuk solusi baterai industri.

2023
Merangkul inovasi dengan berfokus pada penelitian dan pengembangan, yang bertujuan untuk menghasilkan produk dan layanan canggih yang meningkatkan kualitas, efisiensi, dan keberlanjutan dalam industri baterai.

Name: Dolco Verhuur
Description:
Al meer dan 25 jaar dé betrouwbare partner in machineverhuur!  
Met meer dan 25 jaar ervaring in het verhuren van machines maakt Dolco verhuur dé specialist voor verschillende projecten. Wij beschikken over diverse soorten bouwkranen, compact kranen en een breed scala aan hoogwerkers. Maar ook voor minigravers, steigers en tuin- en parkmachines bent u bij ons aan het juiste adres. Wij hebben alles in huis om uw werk veilig en efficiënt uit te voeren. 

Dolco Verhuur gaat verder dan alleen het verhuren van materieel. Heeft u advies nodig op locatie of zoekt u een machinist? Wij verzorgen dit graag voor u. Ons team staat klaar om u op uw werkterrein te ondersteunen met onze expertise, zodat uw project zo efficiënt mogelijk kan worden uitgevoerd. Op deze manier zorgen we ervoor dat uw projecten veilig en, waar mogelijk, op een duurzame manier worden gerealiseerd.

Betrouwbaarheid en continuïteit: Hoewel wij er alles aan doen om onze machines in perfecte staat af te leveren, kan er altijd een storing optreden. Wij beschikken over een eigen servicedienst die snel en flexibel reageert bij eventuele problemen. Zo zorgen we ervoor dat we bij een storing de stagnatie tot een minimum beperken. 

- Onze machines worden jaarlijks gekeurd, consequent onderhouden en gecontroleerd, zodat ze altijd veilig en efficiënt op uw project verschijnen. 
- Service op maat: Of het nu gaat om advies op locatie of snelle levering – wij zorgen ervoor dat je volledig ontzorgd wordt. 
- Breed assortiment en flexibiliteit: Van zware bouwmachines tot klein materieel wij verhuren geen nee. Door middel van onze eigen transportmiddelen kunnen we vaak dezelfde dag nog leveren! 

Met Dolco Verhuur bent u verzekerd van een betrouwbare partner die uw project naar een hoger niveau tilt en u in staat stelt het maximale rendement uit onze machines te halen. Neem contact met ons op en ontdek de mogelijkheden. 

Wil jij deel uitmaken van ons gezellige team? Check onze website voor openstaande vacatures!

Description:
Day & Night Co. (DNC) is a company that moved from the US into the Gulf over 15 years ago. Since then, we have grown as a trusted partner for turnkey power solutions—delivering reliable, high-performance diesel generator rentals and support services that keep your operations running 24/7. Headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, with presences all around KSA, we specialize in rapid deployment, predictive maintenance, and safety-first execution for projects of any scale.

What We Do

Generator Rentals: Flexible fleets from 60 kVA to 2 MW, available on daily, monthly, or multiyear terms.

Emergency & Backup Power: Guaranteed 24/7 response, with dispatch times under 60 minutes in the Riyadh metro area and nationwide coverage within 6 hours.

Fuel Management & Testing: Turnkey fuel-supply plans, load-bank testing, and predictive-maintenance solutions to maximize uptime and minimize operational risk.

Installation & Logistics: In-house rigging and certified engineers ensure safe, efficient site setup—whether it’s a remote mining camp, large-scale construction site, or critical infrastructure facility.

Why Choose DNC

Unmatched Reliability: 98 % fleet uptime powered by Tier 1 Caterpillar & Cummins equipment.

Safety & Compliance: ISO 9001 & ISO 45001 certified, with zero lost-time incidents in over 1,200 operating days.

Local Expertise: Deep knowledge of KSA regulations, permitting processes, and site logistics—backed by a team fluent in English & Arabic.


Our Mission
To engineer opportunity by powering progress—anywhere, anytime. We’re committed to delivering end-to-end power solutions that boost productivity, safeguard continuity, and support the region’s most ambitious projects.

Description:
Established almost 40 years ago on the principles of Quality & Excellence, Gwent Mechanical Handling have built up an enviable reputation for high quality customer service. We have achieved many awards for quality and business practice including the internationally recognised accreditations.
	The quality standard ISO 9001
	the environmental standard ISO 14001
	The occupational health and safety standard ISO 45001
In addition to these we are one of the first companies in the UK to have been awarded the Certificate of Compliance by the UK’s foremost authority on materials handling: the Fork Lift Truck Association (FLTA), have won numerous STILL and Doosan forklift dealer awards as well as the Wales Quality Awards and also the prestigious Investors in People Award. We have recently been celebrating 30 years membership of the prestigious Fork Lift Truck Association (FLTA) and have also been members of the British Industrial Truck Association (BITA). We could go on...
Many of these awards are highly regarded international awards and reinforce our ongoing commitment to quality, health & safety and the environment, one that is deeply embedded in our company’s culture and our business processes. A number of our customers come from highly regulated industries, such as health, electronics, pharmaceutical, food and beverage, rail, aerospace and local authorities, so it’s important to maintain and continuously improve upon our own stringent standards.
 We are based 2 minutes from the M4 near Newport, in our own 13,000sq ft premises, complete with fully equipped workshops, secure storage yard and forklift parts stores.
Our team of engineers are fully skilled

Name: Italnolo Franchising
Description:

Oggi ITALNOLO Franchising conta oltre 40 società indipendenti che gestiscono i centri di noleggio, distribuiti in 10 Regioni d’Italia: Piemonte, Liguria, Lombardia, Emilia Romagna, Trentino, Veneto, Friuli, Toscana, Lazio, Campania.

Lo sviluppo di nuove sedi procede ad un ritmo di 2/3 nuovi centri ogni anno, alcuni dei quali rappresentato ulteriori aperture di chi ha già attive una o due sedi Italnolo, questo a testimonianza della validità economica della proposta Italnolo.

I valori di riferimento aziendali (fatturati, numero di nuovi clienti, numero di contratti, investimenti in flotta noleggio) sono tutti costantemente in crescita e gli sviluppi futuri legati alle incertezze dell’economia globale non faranno altro che spostare il lavoro reale sul locale dove, ITALNOLO, ha già da tempo radicato la propria attività e sviluppato le potenzialità che solo un noleggio generalista può garantire.

Nasze dystrybutory robią robotę – wyglądają świetnie, działają niezawodnie, a woda smakuje tak, jak powinna. Tyle.

Czy robimy rewolucję? Nie krzyczymy, że zmieniamy świat. Ale robimy coś całkiem zwyczajnego – tylko lepiej.

Innovative Technology

Our state-of-the-art Vacuum Tankers are utilized across diverse industries, including Cement & Concrete, Bulk & Minerals, Energy, Grain, Foundry and water. These units are designed for a variety of cleaning applications, ensuring efficient and effective results.

We pride ourselves on providing the latest technology for rapid response and high-volume spillage control and cleaning. Our Vacuum Tankers are ideal for:

*Clearing spillages and blockages

*Emptying silos, storage areas, pits, and tanks.

*Planned housekeeping and maintenance tasks.

*Removing wastewater, sludges and silts.

Collected materials can be transferred using various methods, including blowing back into silos or tankers, or tipping into waste bays and skips. Our custom-built machines enable material transfer at speeds up to three times faster than standard Vacuum Tankers.

Name: Captains Solutions Services and Trade
Description:
Welcome to Captains Solutions Services and Trade! 

At Captains Solutions, we specialize in providing comprehensive solutions for ship and vessel maintenance, as well as offering top-tier manpower and scaffolding supply services. With a commitment to excellence and a wealth of industry expertise, we pride ourselves on delivering unparalleled support to our clients in the maritime sector.

Our team of skilled professionals is dedicated to ensuring the smooth operation and upkeep of ships and vessels, employing advanced techniques and cutting-edge technology to maximize efficiency and safety. Whether it's routine maintenance, emergency repairs, or specialized services, we have the knowledge and resources to meet the unique needs of each vessel we serve.

In addition to our maintenance services, we also excel in manpower and scaffolding supply, offering reliable staffing solutions and high-quality scaffolding equipment to support a wide range of projects. Our skilled workforce and premium scaffolding products ensure that our clients have the resources they need to complete their tasks safely and efficiently.

Furthermore, Captains Solutions is a trusted provider of heavy equipment rental, with a diverse fleet of cranes ranging from 25 tons to 600 tons. Our state-of-the-art equipment, coupled with experienced operators, enables us to tackle even the most demanding lifting and construction challenges with precision and confidence.

At Captains Solutions, our mission is to be the premier choice for ship and vessel maintenance, manpower and scaffolding supply, and heavy equipment rental services. We are committed to excellence in everything we do, striving to exceed expectations and build lasting partnerships with our clients. Contact us today to learn more about how we can support your maritime needs.

Name: Newcastle Car & Truck Rental
Description:
Newcastle Car & Truck Rental is a locally owned and operated company based in the Hunter Region of New South Wales. Established for over 20 years, the company has built a reputation for providing reliable and high-quality vehicle rental services to individuals and businesses in the region.
One of the standout features of Newcastle Car & Truck Rental is its extensive fleet of vehicles, which caters to a wide range of needs. They offer a diverse selection of cars, trucks, buses, vans, utes and 4WDs, all of which are maintained to the highest standards. Their fleet is suitable for various purposes, including mining, civil and construction projects, and personal and recreational needs.
The company takes pride in offering competitive pricing options to its customers, making its rental services accessible to all. Additionally, their friendly and knowledgeable staff are always available to provide assistance and advice to customers, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free rental experience.
In addition to its range of commercial vehicles, Newcastle Car & Truck Rental also offers a selection of trucks specifically designed for house moves. These trucks are spacious and sturdy, with features such as hydraulic lifts and air conditioning to make the move as comfortable and efficient as possible.
Being a family-owned and operated business, Newcastle Car & Truck Rental strongly emphasises providing a personal touch to their services. They understand the importance of building long-lasting relationships with their customers and strive to provide a level of service that exceeds expectations.
Overall, Newcastle Car & Truck Rental is a reliable and professional rental company that provides a comprehensive range of vehicles and services to meet the diverse needs of its customers. With their commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, they have become a trusted provider of rental vehicles in the Newcastle and Hunter Region of New South Wales.

Name: Arctic Engineering System Co.,Ltd
Description:
Arctic Engineering System Co.,Ltd Our company was founded in 2001 with a mission to provide high-quality products and solutions in the fluid control field. 

With a spacious workshop spanning 10,500m2, our factory is equipped with advanced machinery that enables us to produce valves, flanges, elbows, pipes, and customized machinery that meet the unique needs of our global clients.

We take pride in our commitment to quality, and our team of experienced engineers and technicians work tirelessly to ensure that each product meets or exceeds industry standards. 

We use only the highest quality materials and the latest manufacturing techniques to produce products that are reliable, durable, and cost-effective.

At our factory, we offer a wide range of products to meet the diverse needs of our clients. Our valves are available in a variety of materials, sizes, and configurations, making them suitable for a range of applications, including water treatment, chemical processing, and oil and gas production. Our flanges and elbows are designed to withstand high pressure and temperature environments, making them ideal for use in the petrochemical and power generation industries.

We also specialize in the production of pipes, which are available in a range of materials, including carbon steel, stainless steel, and alloy steel. Our pipes are manufactured using the latest welding techniques, ensuring that they are strong, durable, and leak-free. Additionally, we offer customized machinery, which is designed to meet the specific needs of our clients.

With our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility, experienced team, and commitment to customer satisfaction, we are well-positioned to meet the evolving needs of our clients and remain a leader in the industry for years to come.

More details can find from our website  www.tianhaomachinery.com

Name: Stucxglobal İstif Makineleri
Description:
KURUMSAL
Stucx Global , 10 yıldır elde edilen forklift,depo ekipmanları ve iş makinaları üzerine deneyimi ile bu ürünlerin sıfır satışı, kiralama projeleri , forklift ve depo ekipmanları alım satım konusunda faaliyetini sürdürmektedir. Stucx'ın amacı , fayda maliyet çizgisinin buluştuğu yerde müşterinin istifleme , depolama , lojistik hizmetlerine kiralama yoluyla veya satın alma noktasında katkı sağlamaktır. Özellikle uzun yılların vermiş olduğu tecrübe ve iş partnerleri sayesinde kısa sürede taleplerinizi yanıtlama , bilgilendirme, fiyatlama yeteneğine sahiptir. Türkiye piyasasında bulunan tüm forklift markalarıyla partnerliği olan Stucx’ın hedefi müşterisine en doğru makinayı, en hızlı ve en düşük maliyetle sunmaktır.Adana bölgesinde servis hizmeti kapsamında da bir çok yetkili firmayla iş partnerliği içerisinde olması , hem 2.el alınmış makinaların onarılmasında güvenli ve titiz olduğunu göstermekte , hem de kiralama projelerinde yaşanılan teknik sorunlarda müdahale kabiliyetini geliştirmektedir.
KİRALAMA PROJELERİ
Mümkün olan teknik içeriği ve fiyat politikası size en uygun markayı sizlere sunuyor ve aynı zamanda bu markaların tüm bakım , onarım işlemleriyle biz ilgileniyoruz.
Sıfır ve 2.el kiralama konusunda sizlere ayrı ayrı teklifler sunup size uygun olanı beraber kararlaştırıyoruz.
Türkiye’de mevcut bulunan tüm markalarla partner olduğumuz için öncelikle sizin marka talebinizi alıp , fiyatlandırmamızı yapıyoruz.Maliyetler yüksek çıktığında ise alternatifleri sizlere sunuyor aynı hizmeti size daha uygun maliyetle vermeyi taahhüt ediyoruz.Sıfır forklift ve depo ekipmanlarında minimum 36 aylık proje çalışıp , daha kısa süreli kiralama projelerinizde 2.el ürünlerimizi değerlendiriyoruz.Burada amaçlanan aynı işi sizlere daha düşük bütçelerle gerçekleştirmektir.

Name: Minot Brothers
Description:
Welcome to Minot Brothers Ltd — the UK’s first net‑zero plant hire company. We deliver electric and low‑emission plant that cuts carbon, cost and noise without sacrificing productivity. Led by people from the construction industry, we understand the realities of programme, budget and site constraints—and design solutions that work.

Policy and advocacy
We champion practical, evidence‑led policies that accelerate decarbonisation in construction. Our focus areas include NRMM standards and enforcement, clean air/CAZ requirements, PAS 2080 implementation, and public procurement (e.g., PPN 06/21). We advocate for better temporary power access on sites and clear, staged phase‑out pathways for diesel plant that protect productivity. We share real‑world data to inform consultations and industry guidance.

Thought leadership
We publish case studies and data insights, and provide CPD/toolbox talks for project teams.

Based in Essex and serving the UK. Join us to build cleaner, quieter, more efficient sites—and to help shape sensible, sustainable construction policy. Reach out for a demo or a zero‑diesel site plan.

Name: Seday Equipamentos
Description:
A Seday Equipamentos celebra com orgulho seus 25 anos de história, uma jornada marcada pela construção de parcerias sólidas com grandes empresas, sempre pautadas na sinceridade, eficiência e pontualidade. Fundada em 1999 em Ouro Branco-MG, a empresa atua nos segmentos de locação de máquinas e equipamentos, com ou sem mão de obra, e transporte pesado, utilizando caminhões basculantes.

Com uma atuação expressiva, a Seday atende setores como siderurgia, mineração, construção e empresas prestadoras de serviços, oferecendo soluções completas para locação e transporte de produtos e subprodutos, sempre com um olhar atento à sustentabilidade e responsabilidade socioambiental.

Ao longo desses 25 anos, a Seday construiu sua trajetória com base em competência e credibilidade, apoiada por uma equipe de profissionais qualificados e comprometidos com a excelência no atendimento.

Nosso maior objetivo é proporcionar soluções eficientes e seguras em transportes e locação de máquinas e equipamentos, com rapidez, qualidade e respeito ao meio ambiente e aos nossos clientes.

A Seday Equipamentos faz parte do grupo Avapex Transportes e Innomach Equipamentos, que juntos compartilham mais de 40 anos de experiência no mercado, consolidando-se como referência na entrega de serviços inovadores e de alto padrão.

Name: Evolution POWER Projects
Description:
Located in Fort St. John, we are a full service rental  company servicing most of British Columbia and Alberta.

Evolution Power Projects was formed in order to fill a demand in the local energy sector to improve clean power conditions. Our purpose is to deliver low carbon power solutions, for projects that would require off grid power or, to assist with distribution and placement during early phase construction integrated grid projects. We are passionate about offering cost effective carbon reducing options and are committed to staying at the forefront of technology advancement in order to help our customers reach their environmental goals.

Our focus now is to continue following environmental science, emerging technologies and legislation, and introducing new technologies and equipment offerings to our customers while demonstrating a resourceful, mindful approach to project and power planning. Evolution is growing in scope and capacity, with a geographic reach covering most of Alberta and British Columbia, and new project opportunities developing each day. Our portable microgrids have expanded from light demand power in the 100kW range to a diverse product line capable of meeting multi megawatt power demands, crossing industry to include any customers examining their approach to remote power and electrical distribution or looking for ways to reduce their carbon footprints. We are working hard to drive forward diesel displacement and advocate the adoption of natural gas fuel powered systems.

Description:

Ürünlerimiz arasında farklı kapasitelere ve özelliklere sahip forkliftler bulunmaktadır, böylece müşterilerimiz ihtiyaçlarına en uygun olanı seçebilirler. Forkliftlerimiz düzenli olarak bakım ve kontrollerden geçirilir, böylece verimliliklerini ve güvenlik standartlarını koruyabilmekteyiz.

Ayrıca, müşterilerimize deneyimli ve uzman operatörlerimizle birlikte çalışma seçeneği de sunmaktayız. Bu sayede müşterilerimiz forkliftleri güvenli bir şekilde kullanarak işlerini sorunsuz bir şekilde tamamlayabilirler.

Elite Forklift olarak müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutuyoruz ve her zaman kaliteli hizmet sunma gayreti içindeyiz. Eğer forklift kiralama veya daha fazla bilgi talep etmek isterseniz, bize başvurabilirsiniz.

Name: Alluagro
Description:
We are from ALLUAGRO. Join our team in the field! We are the intelligence and Geolocation for Agricultural machinery and implements. And we present you with a question:
 
What’s the world’s biggest challenge in 2050?
 
According to FAO / UN, the biggest challenge is to feed 9 billion people in the world. And the only way we can do that sustainably is by empowering small and medium farmers.
 
And this is the mission of ALLUAGRO.
 
Therefore, we have been to the market and we have felt some market pains. Pains like Joseph’s. A farmer, who has a 1 million dollar Combine Harvester, which is idle for approximately 10 months. Not renting it, prevents him from earning 1,6 million dollars. Besides, his machinery depreciates 9.000 USD a month. He wants to rent it, but he can't find the customers.
On the other hand, we have a small/medium farmer, who has his main source of income in agriculture. This small farmer has a few machineries, and those machineries are old, and do not help him sustaining his business model in a proper way. They need to rent highly technological machinery, but for this small medium farmer, it's pretty hard to find it within reasonable time and way.
 
So, we from ALLUAGRO connect both of them, the machinery owners to the small/medium farmers that need those machineries, and vice versa. We do so through our Mobile App with Geolocation technology. For machinery owners, we bring the possibility of increasing their income, accelerating their ROI, a better view, a better understanding on how to make money, and to farmers we deliver the access to technology, organization, agility, professionalism, timing, and a safe renting process.
 
This way we generate logistics intelligence, reducing transportation timing and risk, connecting both on a more effective way, with rental insurance included. If your machine does not have insurance, during rental time in ALLUAGRO, it will be safe.

Name: Rixax Verhuur
Description:
Rixax verhuur, een betrouwbare en servicegerichte verhuurpartner.

Met ons uitgebreide assortiment van o.a. machines, hoogwerkers en steigers bedienen wij verschillende sectoren. Kenmerkend aan ons is de grote voorraad gecombineerd met de snelheid van onze leveringen en onze 24/7 bereikbaarheid. Door inzet van eigen keurmeesters leveren wij goed onderhouden materiaal en onderhouden we materiaal bij langere huurperiodes ook op locatie.

Als erkend lid van 'Verhuren Nederland' acht Rixax kwaliteit en veiligheid hoog in het vaandel. Wij voldoen aan de strengste eisen op het gebied van veiligheid en zijn VCA gecertificeerd. De veiligheid van onze medewerkers en onze klanten staan bij ons centraal. Door een strikt keuringsbeleid worden alle machines bij retourname onderhouden en opnieuw gereed gemaakt voor de verhuur. elke machine gaat schoon en getest de deur uit.

Rixax is het eerste verhuurbedrijf met de status 'Known supplier Schiphol'. Known Supplier brengt met zich mee dag het bedrijf en ons personeel moet voldoen aan strengere veiligheidseisen. Hiervoor hebben hebben wij meerdere opleidingen gevolgd en zijn we in het bezit van de benodigde vergunningen om te kunnen leveren achter de douane. Hierdoor kunnen we nog sneller het materiaal bij onze klanten afleveren.

Naast de verhuur van materiaal bieden wij ook diverse opleidingen in ons opleidingscentrum. Hierdoor leveren we niet alleen materiaal maar zorgen we ook voor de noodzakelijke kennis om onze producten veilig en effectief te kunnen gebruiken. Onze opleidingen worden gegeven door vakbekwame instructeurs met ruime praktijkervaring. 

Rixax Verhuur, Nee is géén optie!

Name: torremovil.com
Description:
La marca comercial torremovil.com nace en España el año 2012 como una división de Layher, S.A. torremovil.com comienza con un único almacén en Madrid desde el que se gestiona el alquiler de andamios y también su venta, pero pronto se irá viendo ampliada su presencia dentro del territorio nacional al incorporar almacenes en Galicia, Andalucía y Valencia desde los que se distribuye de forma más ágil el andamio de aluminio fabricado por Layher. En la actualidad torremovil.com sigue en un constante proceso de crecimiento con la incorporación de empresas franquiciadas.

En la actualidad, dentro de Layher, que es nuestra empresa matriz, somos más de 2100 los corazones y mentes dedicados al éxito de los clientes. Vivimos para el andamio, y el andamio es algo nos encanta.

 - Fiabilité : Tous nos équipements sont rigoureusement entretenus et vérifiés afin de garantir des performances optimales sur vos chantiers et événements.

 Que vous ayez besoin de matériel pour une construction, un aménagement paysager, un événement ou toute autre activité, TM LOC dispose d'une large gamme d’équipements modernes et sécurisés pour répondre à vos attentes. Nous comprenons l'importance d'un équipement fiable pour le succès de vos projets, et nous mettons un point d'honneur à vous offrir des solutions sur mesure.

Envie de travailler avec un partenaire qui comprend vos défis ?
Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui et découvrez comment TM LOC peut vous accompagner dans vos projets, avec un service personnalisé et des solutions efficaces.

Equipez-vous sans limite, louez en toute simplicité.

Name: Allsop & Francis Ltd
Description:
At Allsop & Francis we are focused on providing exceptional commercial laundry solutions for our clients. We do this by improving the effectiveness and efficiency of commercial laundry operations. This is achieved by specifying the optimal equipment and laundry operations set-up, accompanied by the training required to run the operation at peak performance.

Established in 1991, our no.1 priority is to provide our customers with great service, excellent value for money and solutions that have been tailored to the specific requirements of each laundry operation.  

Being approved professional partners for both Miele and Electrolux Professional, is a unique position in the market. This enables us to offer a broad range of the highest quality and most efficient equipment available, tailored to suit our clients' individual needs and requirements.

We know the value of great service backup too. All of our engineers have been directly trained by the manufacturers and have on average over 20 years experience in the industry. Each engineer carries over £10,000 worth of spares, enabling us to achieve a very high first time fix rate, ensuring that our customers get the best level of service, to compliment the best machines.

We take the time to provide free site visits and consultations. By assessing the nature and level of laundry demand at each site, we advise on the optimal equipment and set-up for each laundry operation. 

With the flexibility to offer purchase, rental and lease options, as well as ongoing service and maintenance on both new and existing machines, there is a solution we can provide to maximise the productivity and efficiencies of each commercial laundry operation .

We know that by focusing on providing valuable advice and training, rapid support and outstanding customer service, we can build long term relationships with our customers that benefit us all.

Name: AUX MAISONS DES POSSIBLES
Description:
D’anciens bâtiments viticoles, coincés dans le village de Saint-André et imbriqués dans les habitations, ont été récupérés après de multiples aventures. De cette situation inattendue est née un rêve, un souhait : remettre de la vie dans notre hameau, rapporter des activités au plus près de nous, repenser un lieu plein de vie, où l’on aurait plaisir à venir, pour se croiser, avoir des services ou juste se ressourcer.

De ce rêve sont nées les Maisons des Possibles. Après une étude de faisabilité menée par le cabinet d’architectes Kayak Architecture, choisi pour son engagement environnemental, une équipe se constitue pour mener à bien ce projet de Tiers-Lieu.

Mais qu’est-ce qu’un Tiers-Lieu ? C’est d’abord un lieu où on a plaisir à se retrouver, qui n’est ni la maison (le premier lieu), ni le travail (le deuxième lieu) . C’est aussi un endroit où l’on retrouve plusieurs activités. Dans notre cas ce sera :
-Un espace psychocorporel : avec un angle d’abord orienté vers les troubles du neuro-développement chez l’enfant, l’ado et l’adulte, cet espace permettra d’accueillir des professionnels paramédicaux et du bien-être ;
Un espace de vie sociale : un espace où les habitants et les membres de l’Association peuvent proposer des activités et faire remonter leurs besoins ;
- Un espace café et à terme restauration : quoi de mieux qu’un lieu où l’on boit et l’on mange pour créer de la convivialité ?
- Un espace de séminaire et des hébergements associés : une grande salle est également disponible. Ce lieu permet de fournir un lieu supplémentaire pour les activités et les rassemblements professionnels. Des hébergements sur site et alentours (gites, etc.) permettent à des entreprises d’accueillir des collaborateurs venant d’ailleurs. Ces hébergements servent également le week-end pour des cyclotouristes ou d’autres vacanciers en quête de nature.
Une deuxième phase permettra d’avoir d’autres activités :
- Des espaces de coworking ainsi que des bureaux
- Des ateliers partagés

Description:
Winch Hire Australia is Australia’s favorite supplier of heavyweight equipment for lifting, shifting and pulling available for hire to meet the needs of the commercial, industrial, construction, telecommunications, civil, mining and marine industries.

-	All certification provided

-	Innovative equipment solutions

Brett Williamson started the company in 1996 when he saw a need for industry to hire highly specialised, up-to-the-minute equipment on a project-by-project basis. “Today 20 years later, Winch Hire Australia remains the market leader because we have the big jobs covered with machines that can lift and pull from 250 kg to 60 tonnes, as well as the experience, servicing skills and commitment to safety,” he says.

Winch Hire Australia has a highly experienced team of qualified tradesmen with amazing product awareness and industry experience, which is a huge benefit to our customers. Our team is flexible and always coming up with solutions to meet any and all project requirements, which means greater efficiency and reduced costs.

We are dedicated to keeping up with the latest techniques, as we test and buy new equipment on an ongoing basis. We also keep up to date with legislative changes, including Workplace Health and Safety requirements. For example, all machines are fitted with safety screens to protect the machine operators. Safe operating procedures are provided with all specialised equipment as a print out and on the machine.

Name: AMAR UHP
Description:
Robimy to od lat,
i robimy to profesjonalnie
Nasza działalność sięga roku 1989, gdy rozpoczęliśmy naszą podróż jako skromne przedsiębiorstwo oferujące drobne usługi podnośnikowe w malowniczym województwie pomorskim. Ale jak mówią, czas to najlepszy nauczyciel, który prowadzi nas ku niesamowitym przemianom.

Za sprawą rosnących oczekiwań naszych klientów, postanowiliśmy stawić czoła wyzwaniom i zainwestować w rozwój naszej działalności. Już w 1991 roku zdecydowaliśmy się skupić na branży stoczniowej, poszerzając nasz park maszyn, by zawsze być na czele technologicznej rewolucji.

Dzisiaj jesteśmy prawdziwymi pionierami, wdrażając najnowocześniejsze technologie w przemyśle stoczniowym. Nasze oddziały nieustannie pracują na terenie wszystkich polskich stoczni, co świadczy o naszej zdolności do dostarczania niezawodnych rozwiązań na najwyższym poziomie.  Nasze ambicje wykraczają poza granice kraju – śmiało przyjmujemy wyzwania z całej Europy, udowadniając, że nasza reputacja nie zna granic.

Nie martwimy się logistyką – jesteśmy mistrzami w tym fachu! W mgnieniu oka, po otrzymaniu zlecenia, mobilizujemy nasze siły i przewozimy sprzęt i najlepszych specjalistów w każde zakątki Europy. Czy to odległe miejsce na mapie czy trudne warunki terenowe – dla nas to żadne wyzwanie.

Skontaktuj się z nami i zanurz się w fascynującym świecie naszych innowacyjnych rozwiązań, które nieustannie przedefiniują standardy w przemyśle stoczniowym.

Description:
EcoDo tilbyr en komplett pakke av miljøvennlige toalettløsninger til ulike typer arrangement. Vi tar oss av frakt og montering av toalettene, samt renhold og avfallshåndtering.

En viktig del av vår forretningsmodell er resirkulering av næringsstoffer fra avfallet, og da spesielt urinen. Urinen skal behandles og resirkuleres til nye og mer bærekraftige gjødselprodukter, og vi er foreløpig i startgropen for å realisere dette.

MÅL: 
Vårt mål er å være den ledende leverandøren av grønne og brukervennlige mobile toalettfasiliteter i Norge.

VISJON: 
Human urin er en naturlig del av den sirkulære bioøkonomien som råstoff til mer bærekraftig gjødsel. Mobile toaletter og urinaler bidrar til dette.

BAKGRUNN:
Vi startet opp i et savn etter flyttbare toaletter som ikke bare er trivelige å besøke, men som også tar hensyn til miljø og (gjen)bruk av ressurser. 

Med bakgrunn fra blant annet avløpshåndtering og bærekraftig konstruksjonsteknikk har vi en kombinasjon av kompetanse som gjør EcoDo til en fremtidsrettet aktør i markedet for mobile toaletter og avfallshåndtering.

Name: BSI GmbH
Description: Die BSI GmbH mit Sitz in Dortmund ist ein angesehener Profi für Arbeitsbühnen und Teleskopstapler in der Region Ruhrgebiet und Nordrhein-Westfalen. Das Unternehmen zeichnet sich durch Präzision und Zuverlässigkeit aus und hat eine beeindruckende Erfolgsgeschichte vorzuweisen. Im Jahr 2008 begann BSI mit dem Vermietgeschäft und bot anfangs zehn Genie Arbeitsbühnen an. Seitdem ist ihre Vermietflotte kontinuierlich gewachsen und umfasst heute mehr als 400 Maschinen mit Arbeitshöhen von drei bis 60 Metern, was sie zu einem der größten Anbieter in diesem Bereich macht. Das Unternehmen kann sowohl die Nachfrage im Verkauf als auch in der Vermietung bedienen, was es zu einem besonderen Höhenzugangsprofi macht. BSI hat eine breite Palette an Produkten auf Lager und ermöglicht eine unkomplizierte und strukturierte Abwicklung der Aufträge, was eine schnelle Auslieferung der Arbeitsbühnen gewährleistet. Eine starke Kundenorientierung und exzellenter Service sind für BSI selbstverständlich. Sie arbeiten mit renommierten Herstellern zusammen und setzen insbesondere auf die hochwertigen Geräte des US-Herstellers Genie. Mit eigener Logistik und ständiger Lagerhaltung von Neumaschinen können sie ihre Kunden kurzfristig und auch in andere Bundesländer im Norden, Westen und Osten Deutschlands beliefern. Die Neumaschinenflotte von BSI umfasst rund 150 durchgängig verfügbare Arbeitsbühnen, darunter qualitativ hochwertige Standard-Neugeräte wie Genie-Elektroscheren-, Gelenk- und Teleskopbühnen, sowie eine breite Auswahl an gut gewarteten Gebrauchtgeräten. Das Unternehmen hat einen Schwerpunkt auf Großgeräte, um der steigenden Nachfrage nach immer größeren Arbeitshöhen und Reichweiten gerecht zu werden.

En Domat Rental, ofrecemos soluciones integrales para la producción y colocación de concreto, diseñadas para optimizar tus procesos productivos y satisfacer tus necesidades específicas. Nos dedicamos a proporcionar equipos de alquiler de alta calidad que cumplen con los más altos estándares de la industria de la construcción.

Nuestros equipos incluyen:

Plantas mezcladoras de concreto
Plantas dosificadoras de concreto
Silos para almacenamiento de materiales (silos autoportantes)
Equipos para transporte, bombeo y colocación de concreto: brazos distribuidores, bombas estacionarias y autobombas de concreto
Minicargadores y dumpers para minicargador
En Domat Rental, entendemos la importancia de cumplir con los plazos y los presupuestos de tus proyectos. Por eso, ofrecemos soluciones de alquiler que se adaptan a tus necesidades específicas de duración y costos, asegurando que puedas mantener tus proyectos en marcha sin contratiempos. Además, brindamos servicio 24 horas de operadores y soporte técnico para garantizar el funcionamiento continuo de nuestros equipos.

Por qué elegir Domat Rental:

Experiencia y Confiabilidad: Con años de experiencia en la industria de la construcción, somos líderes en el alquiler de equipos para la producción y colocación de concreto.
Calidad y Eficiencia: Nuestros equipos están diseñados para ofrecer la máxima eficiencia y durabilidad, ayudándote a lograr resultados óptimos en cada proyecto.
Atención Personalizada: Trabajamos de cerca con nuestros clientes para ofrecer soluciones a medida, asegurando que cada proyecto reciba la atención y los recursos necesarios para tener éxito.

Een materieelhub voorzien van elektrische machines voor Bouw&Infra onafhankelijk gevoed door een externe batterij. Deze batterij GroeneBliksem kan de hub en de materieel accu's voorzien groene (positieve!) energie. Elke aannemer kan door de partnersamenwerking met Groene BouwKracht de projecten emissieloos uitvoeren. Ideaal voor in de binnensteden, natuurgebieden. Zonder uitstoot van Co2, NoX, schadelijke stoffen, stank en herrie. Doordat wij voorzien van materieel en (positieve!) energie op locatie is het onnodig om verschillende werkbussen in de stad te parkeren. De vakmannen kunnen op de fiets! Of per tram! Door te kiezen voor conceptverhuur van de Emissieloze Bouwplaats zijn geen investeringen nodig en wordt er bijgedragen aan een beter milieu. Dit totaalconcept zorgt ervoor dat alles op locatie aanwezig is en er altijd en overal laadstroom beschikbaar is. Wij brengen --> Positieve Energie! --> Groene BouwKracht
