Name: Orzemáquinas, LDA
Description:
Orzemáquinas, Lda

Sobre Nós

Fundada em 5 de agosto de 2009, a Orzemáquinas, Lda é uma sociedade limitada que presta serviços mercantis para as indústrias de Construção Civil, Mineração e Petróleo. Com mais de uma década de experiência, a Orzemáquinas, Lda tem fortalecido sua presença no mercado angolano, oferecendo fornecimentos e serviços regulares em Angola.

Nossa Missão

A Orzemáquinas, Lda se orgulha de seu vasto histórico como revendedora de equipamentos de suporte para diversas indústrias. Nossa principal atividade comercial é a distribuição, venda e aluguel de:

Grupos Geradores
Compressores
Torres de Iluminação
Martelos Hidráulicos
Bombas Submersíveis
Peças Sobressalentes
Filtros das mais conceituadas marcas mundiais
Lubrificantes para compressores de ar (Paroil M, Praoil S, Sigma S460, Sigma Mol, Roto Z, Ultra Sintético).

Como uma das empresas pioneiras com capital próprio a servir as indústrias angolanas, a Orzemáquinas, Lda continua a inovar e expandir seus serviços para atender às crescentes demandas do mercado.

Liderança

Sob a liderança de Zeferino Kuanda, Diretor Comercial e de Marketing, a Orzemaquinas, Lda se destaca em segmentações B2B, B2C e PME. Zeferino traz uma vasta experiência adquirida em empresas multinacionais renomadas como VOLVO (Auto Maquinaria), Grupo SADASA (Mercedes Benz), Media Nova, Atlas Copco Angola, MTA, Paratus Angola (ITA) e AJESF (Agente Toyota). Com uma carreira de 15 anos em consultoria comercial e desenvolvimento, além de formação em administração mercadológica, Zeferino Kuanda está comprometido em impulsionar a Orzemáquinas, Lda para novos patamares de sucesso.

Contate-nos

Estamos prontos para atender às necessidades da sua empresa ou projecto com excelência e profissionalismo. Entre em contato connosco para saber mais sobre nossos produtos e serviços.

Name: Hirepool
Description:
Having access to specialist equipment for jobs when you need it is critical. However, owning and maintaining big gear for construction work isn’t always feasible.
 
At Hirepool we understand the business complexities of construction work. The ramifications of failing to meet safety standards and the importance of having gear that’s readily available at short notice, at the right price.

We’ve geared ourselves up to make hiring equipment a viable business option. One that will help you grow.

We provide a nationwide service with 70 branches and over 600 staff. We offer the largest range of hire equipment in the country – from orbital sanders to earthmoving and excavation machinery. 
Our rigorous safety and compliance processes ensure our gear is serviced to the highest standard. In fact, we employ the largest number of qualified mechanics in the hire industry in NZ to make sure our gear is always in top shape. 

We’ve been servicing businesses large and small for over 60 years. Our gear has helped to build some of New Zealand’s largest projects. These include the Auckland Harbour Bridge, the Clyde Dam Hydro project, Johnstone Tunnels, Waterview Tunnel and Transmission Gully. 

We’re on a mission to provide safe, quality hire equipment solutions to our customers and communities so we can all build a better New Zealand.

Name: Taylor Northeast
Description:
Taylor Northeast is a material handling and industrial cleaning specialist that has been providing vehicle and equipment solutions to businesses in the mid-Atlantic and beyond since 1988. We are authorized dealers of Taylor, UniCarriers, Komatsu, JLG, Cushman, Manitou, Trackmobile, Schreck, Autolift, Elwell-Parker, Big Joe, and Pettibone material handling equipment, as well as Advance industrial cleaning equipment. Our service and support team is among the most knowledgeable and experienced working today, and we provide a full range of fabricating, remanufacturing, and field services along with an extensive parts inventory. 

Taylor Northeast also provides complete overhead crane and forklift safety training programs that will keep your business OSHA-compliant while improving the safety of your team. Our train-the-trainer certification meets all necessary OSHA requirements; we also offer OSHA training for a diverse range of topics.

As part of the H&K Equipment Family of Companies, we have the ability to take on any project and meet the needs of any client, regardless of the size of their business, their location, or their specialized applications. With facilities near Philadelphia, Harrisburg, Pittsburgh, Baltimore, Syracuse, New York, and New Jersey we're always ready to meet your needs. 

Contact us today at (800) 762-2500 to learn what we can do for you.

Forklift ve depo ekipmanları sektöründe yıllardır biriktirdiğimiz tecrübemizle sizlere en iyi, en güvenilir ve en uygun hizmeti sunmak için var gücümüzle çabalıyoruz. depoekipmani.com ekibi olarak özellikle 2.El ekipman tedarik etmenizde ve elinizdeki ekipmanları en uygun şekilde satmanıza yardımcı oluyoruz.

Name: LGH Benelux
Description:
We are LGH!
We have been hiring lifting and hoisting equipment, also known as lifting gear, to companies for more than 50 years. That experience brings specialist knowledge that cannot be found anywhere else in the market. Companies can come to us for everything from renting a hoist to tailor-made solutions for the most complex lifting challenges. We therefore have more than 100,000 lifting and hoisting materials at our disposal.

How do we do it?
Quality and safety are central to us. All the equipment that leaves our premises has the appropriate certificates and is in excellent condition. That is the best way to work safely, for the materials themselves, but more importantly, for the people on site.

A Global Company with Local Support
Founded in the UK by Bill Parkinson. Since then, with over 50 branches in the US, the Netherlands, Germany and Belgium, we have grown considerably whilst supporting our customers. And we will continue to do so with great pleasure and care in the years to come.

We have previously carried out heavy lifting work at a steel plant in Bilbao, helped hoist the sunken Russian submarine Kursk and provided lifting and handling services for the installation of scaffolding structures on buildings in Hong Kong. No matter how small or large the job, our people are there for you.

Name: LUVEGI
Description:
Un conocimiento integral de los procesos y una sólida trayectoria en los diferentes sectores de la industria peruana nos permiten ofrecer Soluciones confiables y personalizadas a nivel nacional. 

Alquilamos grupos electrógenos y torres de iluminación, contamos con un calificado equipo técnico para el mantenimiento de motores y generadores de todas las marcas, así como un área de ingeniería y producción, que fabrica encapsulados acústicos para grupos electrógenos de todas la potencias, ya sea en contenedores o a medida, y realiza proyectos de instalación de equipamiento, simples o complejos.

En los últimos años hemos desarrollado nuevas alianzas con proveedores internacionales de primer nivel, para el desarrollo e implementación de aplicaciones tecnológicas para sistemas de puesta en paralelo, administración y eficiencia energética, análisis de redes eléctricas, monitoreo remoto de equipamiento, monitoreo de flota, sistemas Bi-Fuel, entre otros. Desde 1980 trabajamos permanentemente para brindar a nuestros clientes mejores soluciones y aprovechamos la oportunidad para agradecerles por la confianza que nos brindan cada día.

Name: Mason Rental
Description:
Parte integrante da Mason Holdings, a Mason Rental é uma empresa especializada na locação de equipamentos para os setores de mineração, construção, comércio, indústria e serviços para todo o Brasil.
 
Aliando conhecimento, tecnologia e soluções sob medida, a empresa está presente nos grandes empreendimentos em território nacional com as marcas Cummins - Grupos Geradores, Bobcat - mini-carregadeiras e mini-escavadeiras, Dynapac – compactadoras e pavimentadoras, Clark - empilhadeiras, Komatsu – linha amarela voltada para construção e Manitou – manipuladores telescópicos.

Name: American Crane Solutions
Description:
American Crane Solutions specializes in compact lifting equipment sales, rentals, and inspections.

Our equipment is trusted by facilities across the U.S.—from oil refineries and aviation hangars to food manufacturing and data centers. We provide low-footprint, zero-emissions lifting solutions that eliminate the need for large cranes in tight or sensitive environments.

Our services include:
• Compact crane rentals & sales (1–75 ton capacity)
• Lift director services & critical lift planning
• Crane inspections & OSHA compliance support
• LiDAR scanning & 3D digital twin lift plans

Based in the Gulf Coast, we serve clients nationwide. Whether you’re moving a motor inside a refinery or replacing HVAC on a high-rise, we’ll help you get it done—safely, cleanly, and efficiently.

Name: PT. CIPTA HASIL SUGIARTO
Description:
Perkembangan ekonomi di Indonesia menciptakan sejumlah besar konstruksi, operasi pengeboran minyak dan gas alam di seluruh negeri. Dalam lingkungan ini, operasi domestik dan internasional membutuhkan penyedia transportasi darat dan alat berat yang handal dan berkualitas tinggi untuk memenuhi kebutuhan transportasi dan transportasi mereka.

Kami memiliki kemampuan dan sumber daya yang komprehensif untuk memfasilitasi tuntutan ini dan mencapai hasil tertinggi untuk klien kami. Perusahaan kami telah membentuk aliansi strategis dengan perusahaan internasional dan lokal terkemuka dan telah bekerja berdampingan dalam pengembangan proyek pengeboran minyak dan gas alam. Kami adalah perusahaan yang berpengalaman dan terkenal di bidang Transportasi Darat dan Industri Alat Berat.

Selain itu Kami juga telah mengambangkan jasa untuk Erection Girder dan Konstruksi Jalan Tol. seperti terlihat di banyak lokasi pengerjaan yaitu Jawa Tengah, Jawa Timur, Sumatera hingga Kalimantan.

Name: CES Global
Description:
Welcome to CES Global, a division of CES Power, where we specialize in delivering exceptional temporary power and HVAC solutions. With a strong focus on the entertainment industry and industrial applications, we ensure your project's success with reliable and efficient energy solutions.

At CES Global, our journey has been marked by strategic growth through acquisitions, most notably in the UK. Our recent and largest acquisition of Abird/APEX, a longstanding leader in the power solutions sector, has significantly expanded our capabilities. Known for their expertise in generators, lighting towers, and Remote Fleet Management (RFM), Abird/APEX has established a robust network of specialist depots throughout the UK. This expansion means that wherever you are, a comprehensive Abird/APEX power solution is always within reach.

Whilst we’re committed to our customers, we’re proud to say that our people are just as important. That’s why, since day one, we’ve ensured we recruit the best people into our CES Global business. Our team is our greatest asset, and we invest in their growth and development to maintain our leadership in the industry.

Our mission is to empower your projects by providing top-tier temporary power and climate control solutions tailored to meet the unique demands of each site and scenario. Whether it’s a high-profile entertainment event or a critical industrial operation, our team is equipped with the knowledge, technology, and equipment to deliver seamless service.

Connect with CES Global to stay updated on how we are powering progress with our innovative solutions and dedicated service. Let us be a part of your next project and experience the strength and reliability of CES Global, where power meets performance.

Name: Loca Service
Description:

Depuis son siège à La Bassée et ses onze agences ainsi que son usine au Portugal, l’entreprise propose des solutions complètes pour la grande distribution et l’industrie agroalimentaire : location de meubles réfrigérés, containers, etc... 
Ainsi que des services spécialisés tels que hotlines, remodeling, canalisation, logistique et personnalisation PLV grâce à un studio intégré. Experts de la chaîne du froid, nous assurons une gestion intégrale de la location, de l’entretien à la réservation, en passant par l’installation et la personnalisation graphique.

Entreprise à taille humaine guidée par des valeurs fortes, Loca Service mise sur l’accompagnement, la proximité et l’expertise de ses collaborateurs pour garantir une qualité de service optimale. Forte de plus de quarante ans d’expérience, Loca Service affirme sa position de spécialiste de la location de vitrines réfrigérées et poursuit son développement autour d’une vision humaine, engagée et fédératrice.

Name: Tanker Rent UK Ltd
Description:
Tanker Rent UK is a family-run business specialising in road tanker hire across the fuel, bitumen, chemical and waste sectors.

We’re not a big corporate outfit — just a team of straightforward people who understand the industry and know how important reliability and flexibility are to keeping fleets on the road. We offer fair pricing, flexible hire terms and a return policy that actually works for our customers.

Whether you need short-term cover or long-term support, we’ll find a hire solution that fits. We take pride in being easy to deal with, quick to respond and focused on keeping your operation moving without the hassle.

Our growing fleet and hands-on approach have made Tanker Rent UK a trusted name for operators who value genuine service and honest communication.

Get in touch to discuss your next hire:

Name: H&K Equipment
Description:
H&K Equipment is a material handling and industrial cleaning equipment authority that provides an enormous range of vehicle services to businesses in Western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, North America, and beyond. Founded as an independent forklift dealership in 1983 and tracing its history back to 1935, H&K prides itself in decades of meeting the equipment needs of its customers.

Featuring extensive selections of new and used lift trucks, loaders, railcar movers, personnel carriers, cleaning machines, and much more from over two dozen of the most elite brands in the industry, H&K is more than a heavy equipment dealership. We maintain one of the largest rental fleets in the region and provide full technical and parts support, fabricating, remanufacturing, field services, and other material handling solutions.

H&K also offers comprehensive equipment operator safety courses to meet OSHA requirements and improve workplace safety. Our train-the-trainer program will keep you in compliance and running smoothly.

Our team of experts has the ability to scale our products and services to meet any job, any size, anytime, anywhere. Contact us today and discover why we are the leader in providing specialized equipment and services for specialized needs.

Name: National Lift Truck, Inc.
Description:
At National Lift Truck, we've been delivering reliable industrial lift equipment solutions since 1956. Headquartered in Franklin Park, IL, we specialize in the rental, sales, and service of forklifts, scissor lifts, boom lifts, telehandlers, forklift attachments, carry deck cranes, industrial batteries and chargers, port equipment, and more. 

In addition to an extensive inventory of new and used forklifts and MEWPs for sale or rent, we also offer in-field or in-shop equipment service, repair, replacement parts, haul-for-hire services and logistics, long-term and short-term industrial storage, warehousing services, products, 3PL, and material handling supplies. We also provide forklift, telehandler, and MEWP operator safety training classes. 

We partner with businesses in industries including warehousing, manufacturing, rigging, railroad, building and construction, breweries, agriculture, government and local municipalities, and more, to deliver customized solutions for their industrial lift equipment needs.

National Lift Truck is family-owned and operated and part of a family of companies with locations in Illinois, Tennessee, Arkansas, and New York.

Name: NZ Pump & Energy
Description:
Empowering Projects. Protecting Environments. Driving Reliability.

At NZ Pump & Energy (NZPE), we are New Zealand’s trusted specialists in pump hire, power generation, and energy solutions. Born from the merger of Pump Hire Ltd and NZPGS Ltd, NZPE brings together decades of expertise, a nationwide footprint, and one of the country’s most modern and versatile fleets.

We deliver tailored, end-to-end solutions across industries including construction, mining, wastewater, civil infrastructure, utilities, and disaster response. From dewatering and sewage bypass projects to temporary power and environmental compliance, our mission is to keep New Zealand’s critical projects moving - safely, sustainably, and without compromise.

What Sets Us Apart

Specialist Expertise: Engineers, technicians, and project managers with hands-on experience across complex, high-stakes environments.

Nationwide Fleet: Modern, rigorously maintained equipment available across all major depots.

Customer Focus: Flexible solutions, rapid mobilisation, and 24/7 support.

Sustainability & Safety: Aligned with environmental best practice and strict compliance frameworks.

Name: NoleggioEnergia
Description:
In Noleggio Energia realizziamo investimenti diretti nell’efficientamento energetico e nella produzione di energia da fonti rinnovabili per aziende di qualsiasi settore, affinché possano raggiungere l'indipendenza energetica senza alcun investimento di capitali da parte delle Imprese.

Siamo la piattaforma leader in Italia per il finanziamento di progetti di efficientamento energetico perché:

  rendiamo possibile l’accesso alle migliori tecnologie per l’efficienza energetica
  calcoliamo un piano di noleggio in base ai tuoi consumi attuali effettivi e alla possibilità di installazione dell’impianto sui tuoi tetti
  stabiliamo un piano di noleggio che ti permette di installare l’impianto, pagandolo a piccoli passi e iniziando allo stesso tempo a risparmiare sui consumi!

In poche parole: we invest, you save!

Vuoi accelerare l’efficientamento energetico della tua azienda? Sei un Imprenditore o un Energy Manager e sei in cerca di soluzioni per il risparmio e l’efficienza energetica che non prevedano investimenti eccessivi? Scrivici a  commerciale@noleggioenergia.it. 

Abbiamo già supportato numerose aziende, operanti nei più diversi settori economici, ad accelerare l’efficientamento energetico installando l’impianto adatto e calcolando il risparmio dei consumi con formule a noleggio comode e trasparenti.

Name: Hoogwerkt

Meer weten? Wij denken graag met je mee.

Name: Covey Alquiler
Description:
Bienvenido a Covey Alquiler, empresa especializada en alquiler de vehículos industriales y líder nacional en el alquiler vehículos frigoríficos.

Covey Alquiler cuenta con 25 años de experiencia y una flota de más de 2.200 vehículos, que le permiten ofrecer soluciones de movilidad eficientes tanto para pymes, autónomos e incluso particulares. Cuenta con 20 delegaciones repartidas por toda la península: Almería, Alicante, Barcelona, Bilbao, Cantabria, Córdoba, Girona, Granada, Huelva, Jerez, Madrid, Málaga, Mérida, Murcia, Sevilla, Valencia, Lleida y Zaragoza.

La empresa está formada por más de 90 empleados directos y cuenta con vehículos frigoríficos, furgonetas y carrozados con y sin plataformas elevadoras, con las que se busca dar un servicio en todo el territorio nacional en lo referente al alquiler de vehículos de seco y vehículos para transporte de mercancías a temperatura controlada para todo tipo de negocios y necesidades. Además, existe la posibilidad de alquilar furgonetas camperizadas para viajes vacacionales en algunas de nuestras delegaciones.

Nuestros clientes valoran, como algo importante la baja antigüedad de nuestros vehículos, así como la alta disponibilidad de flota durante todo el año. Vehículos que cumplen todo tipo de normativa, que son cuidados y tratados con mimo para garantizar una experiencia de alquiler de calidad.

Estando a la vanguardia hemos aprendido que lo mejor para nuestros clientes es la transparencia y las ganas de contribuir a que tu empresa sea cada día más eficaz y rentable, porque para Covey lo importante sois tú y tu negocio y es que...

Cuando los mejores se juntan, todo sale bien.

Name: STM Stowarzyszenie Techniki Motoryzacyjnej
Description:
Z końcem listopada 2001 r. inicjatywa zrzeszenia się firm działających w branży wyposażenia warsztatowego przybrała już realny i uprawomocniony kształt. Po rejestracji Stowarzyszenia, 22 listopada tegoż roku odbyło się w Warszawie pierwsze Walne Zebranie Stowarzyszenia Techniki Motoryzacyjnej STM, w którym wzięło udział ponad 40 firm. Głównym celem zebrania było wyłonienie władz statutowych oraz określenie głównych zadań na najbliższy okres.

Zgodnie z zapisem statutu członkami STM mogą być osoby fizyczne uprawnione do reprezentowania firmy działającej w branży techniki motoryzacyjnej.

Stowarzyszenie stawia sobie za cel m.in.:

    reprezentowanie Środowiska wobec innych podmiotów
    zwalczanie nieuczciwej konkurencji
    upowszechnianie zasad etyki w obrocie gospodarczym

Prezesem Stowarzyszenia jest obecnie Pan Rafał Sosnowski, Prezes Zarządu Komplementariusza firmy SOSNOWSKI sp. z o.o. sp.k..

STM z dniem rozpoczęcia działalności stała się wiarygodną reprezentacją środowiska.
Zaproszenie do udziału w Stowarzyszeniu jest kierowane do wszystkich firm zajmujących się produkcją i dystrybucją wyposażenia warsztatowego.

Description:

No solo mediante el alquiler de maquinaria, todo incluido sino también con la venta de los equipos. 
Un servicio todo en uno que ofrece: la maquina más apropiada, el mantenimiento y cambio de baños frecuenciado junto al químico correcto, la gestión del residuo y la entrega al cliente de documentación ambiental para su tramitación final. 
Al mismo tiempo ofrece servicio integral a los departamentos de medio ambiente siendo para cada cliente un gestor eficiente y un recurso de gran valor capaz de gestionar en su nombre desde una declaración anual de residuo industrial hasta la medición de su huella de carbono, pasando por el acompañamiento en la obtención de las certificaciones ISO que requiera tener o cualquier otro aspecto de su negocio que necesite tratar. 
Presta servicio en todo el territorio nacional, dentro de casi cualquier sector, desde Aeroespacial, Naval, Industria Gráfica, sector de la Alimentación, Automoción, Decapados de cualquier tipo de piezas, Energía, Construcción y Mantenimiento Industrial, Ferroviario, en la limpieza de Moldes de Inyección, Componentes Eléctricos, Mecanizado y Decoletaje... Siempre al servicio de la industria con la máxima constante de: Una tecnología de vanguardia en sus equipos  que aplica la inteligencia artificial, con procesos en base agua respetuosos con el planeta, convirtiendo a los clientes en nuestros fans y siempre a un precio justo.

Name: Flexbuis
Description:
Flexbuis. Het woord ‘flex’ in de naam zegt het al. De definitie? Laten we het woordenboek er even bijpakken …:'heel mooi, heel goed' en 'afkorting van flexibel'. Nou, dat dus. We zeggen het niet alleen. Je ervaart het ook. We denken met je mee. Door ervaring weten we wat al mogelijk is. En door onze frisse kijk, zorgen we dat het mogelijk gemaakt wordt. Ook als het er nog niet is. De wereld verandert en wij veranderen mee. Maar op een persoonlijke aanpak kun je blijven rekenen. Altijd. Daarin gaan we ver en dat merk je.

Hoe? Jij krijgt vlot en makkelijk geregeld wat je wilt. Zonder gedoe. Voor velen zijn we dan ook al jarenlang een betrouwbare bekende. Sinds 1 oktober ’22 zijn we onderdeel van Flexpumps. De meest duurzame pompenverhuurder van Nederland. Samen maken we jouw pompinstallatie compleet. Zo vormen we toch een mooi trio? Wij fixen het, jij maakt er gebruik van. Zo doen wij waar wij goed in zijn en kun jij focust je op waar jij het beste in bent.

Oil & Gas

Manufacturing

A empresa possui estrutura setorizada, com uma equipe extremamente comprometida e capacitada, recurso sistêmico exclusivo e parcerias estratégicas com fornecedores e representantes de vários segmentos no setor de segurança do trabalho.

 A ESMETRO é uma empresa com laboratório acreditado pela CGCRE sob o N CAL 0802 para Calibração RBC de Detectores de gases fixos e portáteis, manômetros, vacuômetros e manovacuômetros, segundo os requisitos estabelecidos na ABNT NBR ISO/IEC 17025:2017. Portanto, a ESMETRO é um Organismo de Avaliação de Conformidade (OAC) reconhecido pela CGCRE e autorizado em todo território mundial.

Name: Painter Robot
Description:
Somos uma startup inovadora que desenvolve soluções robóticas para automatizar o processo de lavagem e pintura de edifícios, proporcionando mais segurança, eficiência e escalabilidade. Antes, essa atividade era realizada manualmente, com grande risco de acidentes de trabalho e prazos longos. Com o Painter Robot, o processo se torna mais simples, rápido e familiar aos equipamentos já utilizados pelos pintores, além de resultar em redução de custos e maior lucratividade para as empresas de pintura.

Nosso robô é uma solução 2 em 1, podendo ser configurado tanto para pintura quanto para lavagem, com uma velocidade de pintura 4x mais rápida que a manual. Ele foi projetado para ser simples e fácil de usar, com tecnologias já inseridas no mercado. Oferecemos um modelo de negócios baseado na oferta de licença de uso do robô para as empresas de pintura, no formato de assinatura. Cada plano tem seu período de assinatura e itens inclusos, e o pintor escolhe aquele que melhor se enquadra em suas necessidades.

Além disso, nossa empresa oferece todo o treinamento de operação para o uso correto do robô, garantindo que os pintores estejam prontos para usar a tecnologia com segurança e eficiência. Na Painter Robot, acreditamos que a tecnologia pode melhorar a qualidade de vida dos trabalhadores e aumentar a produtividade das empresas. Venha fazer parte da revolução da pintura e lavagem de edifícios com o Painter Robot.

Name: UTM Industrial Laser Cleaning
Description:
Laser cleaning equipment is the next-generation of industrial surface cleaning. An advanced laser source and laser optical scanner as well as a control system are used to clean metal surfaces. It can be customized according to customer requirements to develop a dedicated cleaning system.
By using the right laser setting, laser cleaning is unmatched in it's ability to clean all the way to the bare metal of your product.
Unlike sand/dry-ice blasting, laser cleaning is much safer for operators and employees. It produces no additional waste and is greener than other alternatives, making it an environmentally-friendly option. This non-abrasive lasers gives your metal product a deep clean without wearing down its surface, extending the lifespan instead of devaluing it. 
Furthermore, laser technology is ideal for cleaning stone, brick, cement, wood, and concrete while removing:
• Rust
• Grease
• Mold
• Oil
• Other contaminants 
By using our powerful, lightweight mobile laser units, abrasive cleaning is a thing of the past.

MLW Rental to partner w zakresie wynajmu i podnajmu maszyn budowlanych oraz przemysłowych, wspierający realizację projektów w Polsce, Europie i poza nią. Obsługujemy inwestycje wymagające niezawodnego sprzętu, terminowości i pełnej zgodności z lokalnymi przepisami.

Dostarczamy sprawdzony, regularnie serwisowany sprzęt renomowanych marek, w tym podesty ruchome, wózki widłowe, ładowarki, dźwigi oraz kompletne wyposażenie budowy. Każde rozwiązanie dobieramy do realnych potrzeb projektu, warunków pracy i harmonogramu inwestora.

Integralną częścią naszej oferty są specjalistyczne szkolenia, w tym szkolenia IPAF, zakończone uzyskaniem międzynarodowych certyfikatów. Szkolimy operatorów i zespoły techniczne, podnosząc poziom bezpieczeństwa, kompetencji i efektywności pracy na budowach oraz w obiektach przemysłowych.

Współpracujemy z firmami z branż: budowlanej, przemysłowej, logistycznej i automotive. Realizujemy m.in. relokacje zakładów, montaż regałów wysokiego składowania, instalacje elektryczne i PPOŻ oraz projekty Data Center. Doświadczenie zdobyte przy dużych projektach międzynarodowych pozwala nam skutecznie wspierać inwestycje o wysokim stopniu złożoności.

MLW Rental to połączenie niezawodnego sprzętu, certyfikowanej wiedzy i odpowiedzialnego podejścia do realizacji projektów.

 Skontaktuj się z nami, aby omówić wynajem maszyn lub szkolenia IPAF dopasowane do Twojej inwestycji.

Description:
Nowoczesność, Ekologia i Zdrowie – Twój dostęp do czystej wody z WATERPOINT SYSTEM!
WATERPOINT SYSTEM to rewolucja w dostępie do wody pitnej – innowacyjna technologia filtracji i dystrybucji, która łączy wygodę, ekologię i zdrowie. Nasze bezbutlowe dystrybutory dostarczają wodę idealną do picia w każdej chwili – gorącą, zimną, gazowaną lub pokojową – bez kompromisów w kwestii smaku i bezpieczeństwa.

 Zrównoważone rozwiązania dla każdego
Obsługujemy przedsiębiorstwa, biura, instytucje publiczne, szkoły, uczelnie, gastronomię, hotele oraz gospodarstwa domowe. WATERPOINT opiera się na zasadzie Point of Use (POU), filtrując wodę bezpośrednio przed jej spożyciem, co zapewnia maksymalną świeżość i minimalizuje ryzyko wtórnych zanieczyszczeń.

 Dbamy o planetę
Redukujemy zużycie jednorazowych opakowań i emisje CO₂ związane z transportem wody butelkowanej. Nasze dystrybutory wspierają ekologiczne podejście, wpisując się w światowy trend zrównoważonego rozwoju.

 Innowacje dla zdrowia i komfortu
Wierzymy, że łatwy dostęp do zdrowej wody to klucz do budowania dobrych nawyków – zarówno wśród dzieci, jak i dorosłych. Filtrujemy wodę, zachowując jej naturalny skład mineralny, co czyni nas idealnym partnerem dla tych, którzy stawiają na jakość i smak.

Dołącz do grona naszych klientów i zobacz, jak WATERPOINT SYSTEM może odmienić Twój dostęp do wody pitnej. #CzystaWoda #Innowacja #Ekologia #Zdrowie

Name: CCSI - Commercial Coating Services International
Description:
Originally founded in 1983 as Commercial Coating Services and known in the industry as CCSI, the company was later acquired and operated under Aegion Coating Services until 2021. In 2022, CCSI emerged with new ownership and a leadership team full of seasoned professionals from the coating and pipeline services industries.

Today, CCSI is the industry leader in FBE coating application equipment as well as the most comprehensive provider of all coating solutions for the pipeline industry and beyond.  We offer an extensive fleet of coating equipment available for rent, including induction generators, heating coils, fusion bonded epoxy (FBE) powder flocking rings, dual fluid beds, blast rings, blast recovery systems, right-of-way transport systems, liquid coating application equipment, material storage rentals, coating test equipment, and more. 

CCSI supplies powder and liquid coating materials from all major manufacturers such as 3M, Valspar, Axalta, Denso, SPC, Carboline, Polygard, and more.  We also supply multiple blast media types.

For a turnkey experience, our certified technicians can provide on-site training, field support, and 24/7 service as needed.

Contact us today to see how CCSI equipment, materials, and services can help you win on your next pipeline project.

Name: Weico Bridge
Description: Wir sind ein Südtiroler Maschinenbauunternehmen, das seit mehr als 25 Jahren auf dem Markt ist und führend in der Vermietung von Brückenuntersichtgeräten ist. Wir verfügen über einen Fuhrpark, der mittlerweile knapp 30 Fahrzeugen verschiedener Größen umfasst, so dass wir alle Arten von Anforderungen erfüllen können. Unsere Geschichte und unser Know-how im Bereich der Präzisionsmechanik und der industriellen Automatisierung, unsere langjährige Erfahrung in der Vermietung dieser Arbeitsbühnen, unsere fundierten technischen Kenntnisse über die Vor- und Nachteile der auf dem Markt befindlichen Maschinen, sowie die stark wachsende Nachfrage haben uns in den letzten Jahren zur Verwirklichung des Projekts WEICO WB1 veranlasst, einer Maschine der neuesten Generation, die die Marktstandards neu definiert, indem sie viele bis dahin bestehende betriebliche Beschränkungen aufhebt und Aspekte verbessert, die scheinbar eher detaillierter Natur sind, uns aber gleichzeitig eine erhebliche Steigerung der Sicherheit und Produktivität ermöglicht haben. Heute sind wir die einzigen, die ihre eigenen Untersichtgeräte bauen und sie dann der Verwaltung, Überwachung und Wartung von Straßenarbeiten zur Verfügung stellen!

Name: Aerial Platform Hire Ltd
Description:
Aerial Platform Hire is Ireland's premier powered access equipment rental company. 

Our extensive fleet features the latest machinery from leading manufacturers like JLG, Niftylift, Genie, LGMG, Hinowa, JCB, Dingli, Manitou and Almac to enable safe work at height across construction, commercial, and industrial applications.

Founded in 1979, we pioneered the access industry in Ireland by supplying the country's first self-propelled boom lifts. Over 40+ years, we've built expertise unmatched in the market through continuous innovation and commitment to delivering unrivalled service and support.

In June 2024, Aerial Platform Hire merged with Blulift, significantly expanding our fleet and depot footprint. We now offer a comprehensive range of scissor lifts, boom lifts, telehandlers and more, including lithium-powered and zero-emission options to meet environmental regulations.

With an enhanced network across Dublin, Cork, Limerick and other strategic locations, Aerial Platform Hire provides local service and nationwide availability. Our experienced team guides customers to the right equipment, delivers timely service, and prioritises worksite safety.

As part of Briggs Equipment Ireland Ltd., we accelerate our vision of being Ireland's top powered access solutions provider with enhanced resources, broader inventory, and a unified commitment to product excellence and customer success.

If you need powered access rental, maintenance, training or 24/7 support, Aerial Platform Hire delivers best-in-class solutions. 

Connect with us today to learn how our unmatched expertise can benefit your next project!

In addition to the products, Eco is proud to have a specialized team of trained technicians to follow up on maintenance and after-sales service. The company also provides an integrated service center equipped with the latest inspection and maintenance tools in the Al-Ramaya area in Haram, in addition to a special department to secure all the necessary spare parts to ensure the continuity and efficiency of all equipment. Choosing Eco means getting a reliable partner that combines innovation and quality in the field of professional kitchen equipment, ensuring you a worry-free experience and highly efficient kitchens. . .

Name: Ace ImageWear
Description:
Why should you shift from your national firm and into local uniform partnership?

You can get lost working with a national company. We do business on a first-name basis. We get to know you, what you need and when you need it. And because we’re an independent company, we adapt quickly to keep up with the changing needs of each industry we serve. Plus:

• Our uniforms help establish your brand—they’re a great way to build and protect your company image.
• Our Smart Garment Technology pairs innovative tech with personal service to eliminate garment shortages—our industry’s greatest challenge.
• We partner with you on everything from uniforms to facility and janitorial supplies, so you can focus on your business and your customers.

With 90 years in this business, we know a few things about customer satisfaction and delivering on our promises.

Ace ImageWear started in 1932 ago in Ed and Clara Heilman’s basement with a washer, a dryer and a commitment. Three generations later, our family is just as committed to the quality service our partners have come to expect. Whatever kind of uniform you need, we’ve got you covered.

Name: WEMO-tec GmbH
Description:
Vor 50 Jahren fokussierte die WERNER-Gruppe die Aktivitäten in den Bereichen Gerüstbau und Brückenzugangstechnik im Unternehmen WEMO-tec; später kam die Vermietung von Hubarbeitsbühnen als weiteres Geschäftsfeld hinzu. Mit einem Team von rund 200 Mitarbeitern sind wir ein kompetenter, erfahrener und zuverlässiger Partner von Unternehmen verschiedenster Branchen. Das wissen auch unsere Kunden – und haben uns zu einer starken Marktposition verholfen. Unser Betriebsgelände befindet sich seit 1989 im verkehrsgünstig gelegenen Gewerbegebiet Eichenzell – hier haben wir viel Raum für modernste Technik und zeitgemäßen Service. Neben dem Hauptsitz in Eichenzell unterhalten wir zwei weitere Mietstationen in Groß-Umstadt und Würzburg sowie eine Abholstation in Schweinfurt. Als Europas größter Vermieter für innovative Spezialmaschinen unterhalten wir Tochterfirmen in Großbritannien und Portugal. Weitere Länder in Skandinavien, Osteuropa und der Alpenregion betreuen wir direkt von Deutschland aus oder über regionale Partner.

Impressum  https://www.wemo-tec.com/impressum/

Name: Zorzi - Rent for event
Description:
Zorzi S.r.l. has been present for over 40 years in the trade fair and food and wine events sector with the rental service of professional equipment for refrigeration, cooking, processing and washing.
The professionalism and quality of the services offered, combined with the passion of the people who work there, have allowed the company to position itself as a market leader capable of meeting the technical needs of all types of requests related to the needs of its customers.

The constant growth of Zorzi S.r.l. and the trust that our customers have placed in us over the years have ensured that we have begun a process of internationalization, which in 2019 led to the opening of Zorzi GmbH based in Stuttgart.

The quality that distinguishes our company is based on the use of state-of-the-art products and punctual and qualified technical assistance; the recognition of this commitment has led Zorzi srl to be selected as the official supplier of the main Italian trade fair organizations.

Extensive experience in the field is put at the complete disposal of customers, ensuring the full success of the service aimed at catering, events and various trade shows; by choosing to rent equipment from Zorzi S.r.l. you will always find the best.The quality of supplies, range of products and assistance included in the service are to ensure the success of your event with customized offers and our constant presence.
